built with pdoc

AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.trigger_lists.attribute 

   1from __future__ import annotations
   2
   3import json
   4from pathlib import Path
   5
   6from AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.dataset_enum import _DataSetIntEnums
   7
   8_attribute_dataset_editor_names = None
   9
  10
  11class Attribute(_DataSetIntEnums):
  12    """
  13    This enum class provides the integer values used to reference all the player resources in the game. Used in effects
  14    and conditions like 'Accumulate Attribute' and 'Modify Resource'
  15
  16    **Examples**
  17
  18    >>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE
  19    <Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE: 0>
  20
  21    You can also request the editor names of these player attributes (resources) to be used in <...> notation in
  22    trigger displays using:
  23
  24    >>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE.editor_name
  25    '!Food Storage'
  26    """
  27
  28    @property
  29    def editor_name(self):
  30        """
  31        The exact name of this resource in the editor. To be used in <...> notation in trigger displays
  32        """
  33        global _attribute_dataset_editor_names
  34
  35        if _attribute_dataset_editor_names is None:
  36            with (Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'sources' / 'resource_editor_names.json').open() as file:
  37                _attribute_dataset_editor_names = json.load(file)
  38
  39        return _attribute_dataset_editor_names[self]
  40
  41    FOOD_STORAGE = 0
  42    """
  43    - Purpose: Current food amount
  44    """
  45    WOOD_STORAGE = 1
  46    """
  47    - Purpose: Current wood amount
  48    """
  49    STONE_STORAGE = 2
  50    """
  51    - Purpose: Current stone amount
  52    """
  53    GOLD_STORAGE = 3
  54    """
  55    - Purpose: Current gold amount
  56    """
  57    POPULATION_HEADROOM = 4
  58    """
  59    - Purpose: Amount of free population space. Note that this is NOT the population cap
  60    """
  61    CONVERSION_RANGE = 5
  62    """
  63    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
  64    """
  65    CURRENT_AGE = 6
  66    """
  67    - Purpose: Controls the age name and icon at the top of the screen
  68    
  69    - Defaults:
  70    
  71        - 0: Dark Age
  72        - 1: Feudal Age
  73        - 2: Castle Age
  74        - 3: Imperial Age
  75    
  76    - Note: Setting this to an amount higher than 3 cycles the icon but keeps the age at imperial
  77    """
  78    RELICS_CAPTURED = 7
  79    """
  80    - Purpose: Number of relics held
  81    """
  82    UNUSED_RESOURCE_008 = 8
  83    """
  84    - Purpose: Unused
  85    """
  86    TRADE_GOODS = 9
  87    """
  88    - Purpose: Unused
  89    """
  90    UNUSED_RESOURCE_010 = 10
  91    """
  92    - Purpose: Unused
  93    """
  94    CURRENT_POPULATION = 11
  95    """
  96    - Purpose: The current population
  97    """
  98    CORPSE_DECAY_TIME = 12
  99    """
 100    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 101    """
 102    REMARKABLE_DISCOVERY = 13
 103    """
 104    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 105    """
 106    MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = 14
 107    """
 108    - Purpose: Number of monuments owned
 109    """
 110    MEAT_STORAGE = 15
 111    """
 112    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 113    """
 114    BERRY_STORAGE = 16
 115    """
 116    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 117    """
 118    FISH_STORAGE = 17
 119    """
 120    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 121    """
 122    UNUSED_RESOURCE_018 = 18
 123    """
 124    - Purpose: Unused
 125    """
 126    TOTAL_UNITS_OWNED = 19
 127    """
 128    - Purpose: Total units owned, excluding buildings
 129    """
 130    UNITS_KILLED = 20
 131    """
 132    - Purpose: Total units killed, excluding buildings
 133    """
 134    TECHNOLOGY_COUNT = 21
 135    """
 136    - Purpose: Number of technologies researched till now
 137    """
 138    PERCENT_MAP_EXPLORED = 22
 139    """
 140    - Purpose: Percentage of the map explored
 141    """
 142    CASTLE_AGE_TECH_ID = 23
 143    """
 144    - Purpose: Always 102
 145    
 146    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 147    """
 148    IMPERIAL_AGE_TECH_ID = 24
 149    """
 150    - Purpose: Always 103
 151    
 152    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 153    """
 154    FEUDAL_AGE_TECH_ID = 25
 155    """
 156    - Purpose: Always 101
 157    
 158    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 159    """
 160    ATTACK_WARNING_SOUND_ID = 26
 161    """
 162    - Purpose: Always 0
 163    
 164    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 165    """
 166    ENABLE_MONK_CONVERSION = 27
 167    """
 168    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy monk conversions
 169    
 170    - Defaults:
 171    
 172        - 0: No (default)
 173        - >= 1: Yes, after Atonement
 174    """
 175    ENABLE_BUILDING_CONVERSION = 28
 176    """
 177    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy building conversions
 178    
 179    - Defaults:
 180    
 181        - 0: No (default)
 182        - 1: Yes, after Redemption
 183        - >=2: Monks can convert buildings from range
 184    """
 185    ENABLE_SIEGE_CONVERSION = 29
 186    """
 187    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy siege conversions
 188    
 189    - Defaults:
 190    
 191        - 0: No (default)
 192        - 1: Yes, after Redemption
 193        - >=2: Monks can convert siege from range
 194    """
 195    UNUSED_RESOURCE_030 = 30
 196    """
 197    - Purpose: Unused
 198    """
 199    UNUSED_RESOURCE_031 = 31
 200    """
 201    - Purpose: Unused
 202    """
 203    BONUS_POPULATION_CAP = 32
 204    """
 205    - Purpose: Additional pop space to grant on top of maximum pop cap
 206    
 207    - Note: 10 for goths
 208    """
 209    EFFECT_FUNCTION_NUMBER = 33
 210    """
 211    - Purpose: Used to invoke functions in XS from data. When set to a non zero value `N`, it will automatically call a function named `EffectFunctionN` from the `Effects.xs` file.
 212    """
 213    UNUSED_RESOURCE_34 = 34
 214    """
 215    - Purpose: Unused
 216    """
 217    UNUSED_RESOURCE_35 = 35
 218    """
 219    - Purpose: Unused
 220    """
 221    FARM_FOOD_AMOUNT = 36
 222    """
 223    - Purpose: Maximum farm food amount
 224    
 225    - Defaults:
 226    
 227        - 175: Default
 228        - 220: Chinese
 229    
 230    - Note: This is what horse collar etc. technologies modify
 231    """
 232    CIVILIAN_POPULATION = 37
 233    """
 234    - Purpose: Current civilian population
 235    """
 236    VILLAGER_POPULATION = 38
 237    """
 238    - Purpose: Current villager population
 239    """
 240    ALL_TECHS_ACHIEVED = 39
 241    """
 242    - Purpose: Boolean: If all available technologies have been researched
 243    
 244    - Defaults:
 245    
 246        - 0: No
 247        - 1: Yes
 248    """
 249    MILITARY_POPULATION = 40
 250    """
 251    - Purpose: Current military popupation
 252    """
 253    CONVERSIONS = 41
 254    """
 255    - Purpose: Number of units converted
 256    """
 257    STANDING_WONDERS = 42
 258    """
 259    - Purpose: Number of standing wonders
 260    """
 261    RAZINGS = 43
 262    """
 263    - Purpose: Number of buildings razed
 264    """
 265    KILL_RATIO = 44
 266    """
 267    - Purpose: This is the number of units lost subtracted from the number of units killed in total
 268    """
 269    SURVIVAL_TO_FINISH = 45
 270    """
 271    - Purpose: Boolean: This is set to `0` under the same conditions which are required to defeat a player
 272    
 273    - Defaults:
 274    
 275        - 0: No
 276        - 1: Yes
 277    """
 278    TRIBUTE_INEFFICIENCY = 46
 279    """
 280    - Purpose: This is the fraction of tributes sent that are collected as tax
 281    
 282    - Defaults:
 283    
 284        - 0.3: Default
 285        - 0.2: After Coinage
 286        - 0: After Banking
 287    """
 288    GOLD_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = 47
 289    """
 290    - Purpose: Multiplier for gold mined by gold miners
 291    
 292    - Defaults:
 293    
 294        - 1: Default
 295        - 1.15: Mayans
 296    
 297    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
 298    """
 299    TOWN_CENTER_UNAVAILABLE = 48
 300    """
 301    - Purpose: Boolean: allow building extra tcs
 302    
 303    - Defaults:
 304    
 305        - 0: No (Sudden Death)
 306        - 1: Yes (Normal)
 307    """
 308    GOLD_COUNTER = 49
 309    """
 310    - Purpose: Total gold collected
 311    """
 312    REVEAL_ALLY = 50
 313    """
 314    - Purpose: Boolean: show ally los for the source player
 315    
 316    - Defaults:
 317    
 318        - 0: No (default)
 319        - 1: Yes, after Cartography or with a Portuguese ally
 320    
 321    - Note: Once set to `1`, setting it back to `0` won't take away the LoS of allies
 322    """
 323    UNUSED_RESOURCE_051 = 51
 324    """
 325    - Purpose: Unused
 326    """
 327    MONASTERIES = 52
 328    """
 329    - Purpose: Number of monasteries
 330    """
 331    TRIBUTE_SENT = 53
 332    """
 333    - Purpose: Total of all resources tributed to others. This does not count taxes paid on tributing
 334    """
 335    ALL_MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = 54
 336    """
 337    - Purpose: Boolean: all monuments on the map captured
 338    
 339    - Defaults:
 340    
 341        - 0: No
 342        - 1: Yes
 343    """
 344    ALL_RELICS_CAPTURED = 55
 345    """
 346    - Purpose: Boolean: all relics on the map captured
 347    
 348    - Defaults:
 349    
 350        - 0: No
 351        - 1: Yes
 352    """
 353    ORE_STORAGE = 56
 354    """
 355    - Purpose: Unused
 356    """
 357    KIDNAP_STORAGE = 57
 358    """
 359    - Purpose: Number of units kidnapped
 360    
 361    - Note: This is probably only used by mods, this usage may be incorrect
 362    """
 363    DARK_AGE_TECH_ID = 58
 364    """
 365    - Purpose: Always 104 
 366    
 367    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this
 368    """
 369    UNUSED_RESOURCE_059 = 59
 370    """
 371    - Purpose: Unused
 372    """
 373    UNUSED_RESOURCE_060 = 60
 374    """
 375    - Purpose: Unused
 376    """
 377    UNUSED_RESOURCE_061 = 61
 378    """
 379    - Purpose: Unused
 380    """
 381    BUILDING_HOUSING_RATE = 62
 382    """
 383    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 384    """
 385    TAX_GATHER_RATE = 63
 386    """
 387    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 388    """
 389    GATHER_ACCUMULATOR = 64
 390    """
 391    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 392    """
 393    SALVAGE_DECAY_RATE = 65
 394    """
 395    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 396    """
 397    UNUSED_RESOURCE_066 = 66
 398    """
 399    - Purpose: Unused
 400    """
 401    CAN_CONVERT = 67
 402    """
 403    - Purpose: Boolean: monks can convert enemy units
 404    
 405    - Defaults:
 406    
 407        - 0: No
 408        - 1: Yes (default)
 409    """
 410    HIT_POINTS_KILLED = 68
 411    """
 412    - Purpose: Cumulative hp of all units killed
 413    """
 414    FARM_FOOD_MULTIPLIER = 69
 415    """
 416    - Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of extra food granted by mill upgrades
 417    
 418    - Defaults:
 419    
 420        - 1: No multiplier (default)
 421    """
 422    SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_X_COORDINATE = 70
 423    """
 424    - Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
 425    """
 426    SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_Y_COORDINATE = 71
 427    """
 428    - Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
 429    """
 430    UNUSED_RESOURCE_72 = 72
 431    """
 432    - Purpose: Unused
 433    """
 434    UNUSED_RESOURCE_73 = 73
 435    """
 436    - Purpose: Unused
 437    """
 438    UNUSED_RESOURCE_74 = 74
 439    """
 440    - Purpose: Unused
 441    """
 442    UNUSED_RESOURCE_75 = 75
 443    """
 444    - Purpose: Unused
 445    """
 446    UNUSED_RESOURCE_76 = 76
 447    """
 448    - Purpose: Unused
 449    """
 450    CONVERSION_RESISTANCE = 77
 451    """
 452    - Purpose: Coefficient of conversion resistance
 453    
 454    - Defaults:
 455    
 456        - 0: Default
 457    
 458    - Note: Probability of conversion every monk second is divided by this value for ALL source player units.
 459    """
 460    TRADE_VIG_RATE = 78
 461    """
 462    - Purpose: Market exchange rate fraction for the source player
 463    
 464    - Defaults:
 465    
 466        - 0.3: Default
 467        - 0.15: after Guilds
 468        - 0.05: Saracens
 469    """
 470    STONE_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = 79
 471    """
 472    - Purpose: Multiplier for stone mined by stone miners
 473    
 474    - Defaults:
 475    
 476        - 1: Default
 477        - 1.15: Mayans
 478    
 479    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
 480    """
 481    QUEUED_UNITS = 80
 482    """
 483    - Purpose: Amount of units in queue
 484    
 485    - Note: Note that only the units waiting to be trained are considered in the queue so if an archery range has 3 archers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 2 archers that are in queue
 486    """
 487    TRAINING_COUNT = 81
 488    """
 489    - Purpose: Amount of units being trained
 490    
 491    - Note: Note that only the FIRST unit in each building is considered as being trained so if a town centre has 4 villagers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 3 villagers that are in queue
 492    """
 493    START_WITH_UNIT_444_PTWC = 82
 494    """
 495    - Purpose: Boolean: started with PTWC
 496    
 497    - Note: Setting this to 1 in an RMS allows for starting with PTWC. Manually changing this in the editor does nothing
 498    """
 499    UNUSED_RESOURCE_83 = 83
 500    """
 501    - Purpose: Unused
 502    """
 503    STARTING_VILLAGERS = 84
 504    """
 505    - Purpose: Number of starting villagers
 506    
 507    - Defaults:
 508    
 509        - 3: Default
 510        - 4: Mayans
 511        - 6: Chinese
 512    
 513    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing
 514    """
 515    RESEARCH_COST_MODIFIER = 85
 516    """
 517    - Purpose: Multiply technology costs by this value
 518    
 519    - Defaults:
 520    
 521        - 1: Default
 522        - 0.9: Chinese in feudal age
 523        - 0.85: Chinese in castle age
 524        - 0.80: Chinese in imperial age
 525    """
 526    RESEARCH_TIME_MODIFIER = 86
 527    """
 528    - Purpose: Multiply technology research times by this value
 529    """
 530    CONVERT_BOATS = 87
 531    """
 532    - Purpose: Boolean: allow monks to convert boats
 533    
 534    - Defaults:
 535    
 536        - 0: No
 537        - 1: Yes (default)
 538    """
 539    FISH_TRAP_FOOD_AMOUNT = 88
 540    """
 541    - Purpose: Maximum fishtrap food amount
 542    
 543    - Defaults:
 544    
 545        - 710: Default
 546        - 2130: Malay
 547    """
 548    HEAL_RATE_MODIFIER = 89
 549    """
 550    - Purpose: Monk healing rate modifier
 551    
 552    - Defaults:
 553    
 554        - 0: The unit of measuremeant for this is unknown
 555    """
 556    HEALING_RANGE = 90
 557    """
 558    - Purpose: Monk heal range
 559    
 560    - Defaults:
 561    
 562        - 4: Tiles
 563    """
 564    STARTING_FOOD = 91
 565    """
 566    - Purpose: Starting food amount
 567    
 568    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting food amount
 569    """
 570    STARTING_WOOD = 92
 571    """
 572    - Purpose: Starting wood amount
 573    
 574    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting wood amount
 575    """
 576    STARTING_STONE = 93
 577    """
 578    - Purpose: Starting stone amount
 579    
 580    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting stone amount
 581    """
 582    STARTING_GOLD = 94
 583    """
 584    - Purpose: Starting gold amount
 585    
 586    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting gold amount
 587    """
 588    ENABLE_PTWC_KIDNAP_LOOT = 95
 589    """
 590    - Purpose: Enable town centre packing for the source player
 591    
 592    - Defaults:
 593    
 594        - 0: Default
 595        - 1: Allows the TC to be packed and moved
 596        - >=2: No noticeable effect
 597    
 598    - Note: Enabling kidnap/loot requires modding the units to have the kidnap/pillage action
 599    """
 600    NO_DROPSITE_FARMERS = 96
 601    """
 602    - Purpose: Enable Khmer farmer bonus
 603    
 604    - Defaults:
 605    
 606        - 0: Default
 607        - 1: Khmer. Farmers no longer need dropoff and steadily gain resources while farming
 608    """
 609    DOMINANT_SHEEP_CONTROL = 97
 610    """
 611    - Purpose: Boolean: force sheep conversion
 612    
 613    - Defaults:
 614    
 615        - 0: Default
 616        - >=1: Celts
 617    
 618    - Note: If this is set to a non zero value, other players' sheep convert to you even if they have a unit in their LOS, unless this is also a non zero value for them. Celt sheep bonus
 619    """
 620    BUILDING_COST_SUM = 98
 621    """
 622    - Purpose: Total cost of all units and buildings owned
 623    """
 624    TECH_COST_SUM = 99
 625    """
 626    - Purpose: Total cost of all researches researched
 627    """
 628    RELIC_INCOME_SUM = 100
 629    """
 630    - Purpose: Total relic gold generated
 631    """
 632    TRADE_INCOME_SUM = 101
 633    """
 634    - Purpose: Total trade gold generated
 635    """

 836    VALUE_KILLED_BY_OTHERS = 152
 837    """
 838    - Purpose: Total cost of all own units lost
 839    """
 840    VALUE_RAZED_BY_OTHERS = 153
 841    """
 842    - Purpose: Total cost of all own buildings lost
 843    """
 844    KILLED_BY_OTHERS = 154

 879    """
 880    UNUSED_RESOURCE_163 = 163
 881    """
 882    - Purpose: Unused
 883    """
 884    VALUE_CURRENT_UNITS = 164
 885    """
 886    - Purpose: Total cost of all own alive units
 887    """
 888    VALUE_CURRENT_BUILDINGS = 165
 889    """
 890    - Purpose: Total cost of all own standing buildings
 891    """
 892    FOOD_TOTAL = 166
 893    """
 894    - Purpose: Total food collected
 895    """
 896    WOOD_TOTAL = 167
 897    """
 898    - Purpose: Total wood collected
 899    """
 900    STONE_TOTAL = 168
 901    """
 902    - Purpose: Total stone collected
 903    """
 904    GOLD_TOTAL = 169
 905    """
 906    - Purpose: Total gold collected
 907    """
 908    TOTAL_VALUE_OF_KILLS = 170
 909    """
 910    - Purpose: Total cost of all units killed
 911    """
 912    TOTAL_TRIBUTE_RECEIVED = 171
 913    """
 914    - Purpose: Total of all resources received in tribute
 915    """
 916    TOTAL_VALUE_OF_RAZINGS = 172
 917    """
 918    - Purpose: Total cost of all buildings destroyed
 919    """
 920    TOTAL_CASTLES_BUILT = 173
 921    """
 922    - Purpose: Number of total castles built
 923    """
 924    TOTAL_WONDERS_BUILT = 174
 925    """
 926    - Purpose: Number of total wonders built
 927    """
 928    TRIBUTE_SCORE = 175
 929    """
 930    - Purpose: Total amount of resources sent in tribute including taxes. 10% of this is counted towards the economy score
 931    """
 932    CONVERT_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = 176
 933    """
 934    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is even possible
 935    
 936    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West
 937    """
 938    CONVERT_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = 177
 939    """
 940    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is forced
 941    
 942    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West
 943    """
 944    CONVERT_RESIST_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = 178
 945    """
 946    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is even possible
 947    
 948    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West
 949    """
 950    CONVERT_RESIST_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = 179
 951    """
 952    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is forced
 953    
 954    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West.
 955    """
 956    CONVERT_BUILDING_MIN = 180
 957    """
 958    - Purpose: Minimum time required to convert a building
 959    
 960    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 961    """
 962    CONVERT_BUILDING_MAX = 181
 963    """
 964    - Purpose: Maximum time required to convert a building
 965    
 966    - Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 967    """
 968    CONVERT_BUILDING_CHANCE = 182
 969    """
 970    - Purpose: Percent chance for monks to convert buildings
 971    
 972    - Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 973    """
 974    REVEAL_ENEMY = 183
 975    """
 976    - Purpose: Boolean: show enemy los for the source player
 977    
 978    - Defaults:
 979    
 980        - 0: No (default)
 981        - 1: Yes, after Spies
 982    
 983    - Note: Once set to `1`, setting it back to `0` won't take away LoS of enemies!
 984    """
 985    VALUE_WONDERS_CASTLES = 184
 986    """
 987    - Purpose: Total cost of all wonders and castles constructed
 988    """
 989    FOOD_SCORE = 185
 990    """
 991    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
 992    """
 993    WOOD_SCORE = 186
 994    """
 995    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
 996    """
 997    STONE_SCORE = 187
 998    """
 999    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
1000    """
1001    GOLD_SCORE = 188
1002    """
1003    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
1004    """
1005    CHOPPING_PRODUCTIVITY = 189
1006    """
1007    - Purpose: Multiplier for wood chopped by lumberjacks
1008    
1009    - Defaults:
1010    
1011        - 1: Default
1012        - 1.15: Mayans
1013    
1014    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
1015    """
1016    FOOD_GATHERING_PRODUCTIVITY = 190
1017    """
1018    - Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered from all sources
1019    
1020    - Defaults:
1021    
1022        - 1: Default
1023        - 1.15: Mayans
1024    
1025    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%. The work rate for farmers is reduced by about 23.4%
1026    """
1027    RELIC_GOLD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 191
1028    """
1029    - Purpose: Relic gold generation rate in gold per minute
1030    
1031    - Defaults:
1032    
1033        - 30: Default. 30 gold per minute (0.5 gold per second)
1034        - 15: After getting hit with Atheism
1035    """
1036    CONVERTED_UNITS_DIE = 192
1037    """
1038    - Purpose: Boolean: converted units die instead of switching over to the enemy
1039    
1040    - Defaults:
1041    
1042        - 0: No (default)
1043        - 1: Yes, after Heresey
1044    """
1045    THEOCRACY = 193
1046    """
1047    - Purpose: Boolean: only one monk needs to regen faith after group conversion for the source player
1048    
1049    - Defaults:
1050    
1051        - 0: No (default)
1052        - 1: Yes, after researching Theocracy
1053    """
1054    UNUSED_RESOURCE_194 = 194
1055    """
1056    - Purpose: Unused
1057    """
1058    CONSTRUCTION_RATE_MODIFIER = 195
1059    """
1060    - Purpose: Builder work rate multiplier
1061    
1062    - Defaults:
1063    
1064        - 0: Default
1065        - 1.3: Spanish
1066    
1067    - Note: The actual work rate for builders is given by `construction_rate_mod * builder.default_work_rate`
1068    """
1069    HUN_WONDER_DISCOUNT = 196
1070    """
1071    - Purpose: Additional time required for relic/wonder victories in one tenth of a year
1072    
1073    - Defaults:
1074    
1075        - 0: default
1076        - 1000: (100 years) for the Hun player, after researching atheism. The value of this resource of each player is added to determine the total extra time for relic/wonder victories, i.e. it adds up if multiple hun players get the tech
1077    
1078    - Note: Internally, relic and wonder victory countdowns are measured in one tenths of an year, the fractional part is just not shown ingame
1079    """
1080    SPIES_DISCOUNT = 197
1081    """
1082    - Purpose: Boolean: Halves the cost of spies per villager, and caps it at 15k gold max instead of the usual 30k
1083    
1084    - Defaults:
1085    
1086        - 0: Default
1087    """
1088    UNUSED_RESOURCE_198 = 198
1089    """
1090    - Purpose: Unused
1091    """
1092    UNUSED_RESOURCE_199 = 199
1093    """
1094    - Purpose: Unused
1095    """
1096    UNUSED_RESOURCE_200 = 200
1097    """
1098    - Purpose: Unused
1099    """
1100    UNUSED_RESOURCE_201 = 201
1101    """
1102    - Purpose: Unused
1103    """
1104    UNUSED_RESOURCE_202 = 202
1105    """
1106    - Purpose: Unused
1107    """
1108    REVEAL_MAP = 203
1109    """
1110    - Purpose: Controls the map visibility for a player.
1111    
1112    - Defaults:
1113    
1114        - 0: Normal
1115        - 1: Explored
1116        - 2: All Visible
1117    """
1118    REVEAL_UNIT_ON_MAP = 204
1119    """
1120    - Purpose: Controls the visibility of other players' units for a player
1121    
1122    - Note: Positive IDs will reveal a unit temporarily only when it is created, Negative IDs will reveal a unit permanently
1123    """
1124    FEITORIA_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 205
1125    """
1126    - Purpose: Feitoria food production rate multiplier
1127    
1128    - Defaults:
1129    
1130        - 1: Default
1131    
1132    - Note: The amount of food obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_food_productivity * 1.6`
1133    """
1134    FEITORIA_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 206
1135    """
1136    - Purpose: Feitoria wood production rate multiplier
1137    
1138    - Defaults:
1139    
1140        - 1: Default
1141    
1142    - Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_wood_productivity * 0.7`
1143    """
1144    FEITORIA_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 207
1145    """
1146    - Purpose: Feitoria stone production rate multiplier
1147    
1148    - Defaults:
1149    
1150        - 1: Default
1151    
1152    - Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_stone_productivity * 0.3`
1153    """
1154    FEITORIA_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 208
1155    """
1156    - Purpose: Feitoria gold production rate multiplier
1157    
1158    - Defaults:
1159    
1160        - 1: Default
1161    
1162    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_gold_productivity * 1`
1163    """
1164    REVEAL_ENEMY_TOWN_CENTERS = 209
1165    """
1166    - Purpose: Boolean: reveal enemy town centre location for the source player
1167    
1168    - Defaults:
1169    
1170        - 0: Default
1171        - 5: Vietnamese
1172    
1173    - Note: The bonus works for all values >=1, the choice of setting it to 5 for vietnamese seems arbitrary
1174    """
1175    RELICS_VISIBLE_ON_MAP = 210
1176    """
1177    - Purpose: Boolean: reveal relics on map amount
1178    
1179    - Defaults:
1180    
1181        - -1: Default
1182        - 42: Burmese
1183    
1184    - Note: Burmese reveal relics on map bonus. Only works in RMS, manually changing this in the editor does not seem to have any effects
1185    """
1186    ELEVATION_HIGHER_BONUS = 211
1187    """
1188    - Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from higher elevation
1189    
1190    - Defaults:
1191    
1192        - 0: Default
1193        - 0.25: Tatars
1194    
1195    - Note: Damage that units on higher elevation deal to units on lower elevation is multiplied by `1.25 + elevation_bonus_higher`
1196    """
1197    ELEVATION_LOWER_BONUS = 212
1198    """
1199    - Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from lower elevation
1200    
1201    - Defaults:
1202    
1203        - 0: Default
1204    
1205    - Note: Damage that units on lower elevation deal to units on higher elevation is multiplied by `0.75 + elevation_bonus_lower`
1206    """
1207    RAIDING_PRODUCTIVITY = 213
1208    """
1209    - Purpose: Keshik gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1210    
1211    - Defaults:
1212    
1213        - 0: Default
1214        - 50: (0.5 g/s) Tatars
1215    
1216    - Note: Note that in practice, due to attack reload time and frame delay, Keshiks don't actually produce 0.5 g/s, but a slightly lower value
1217    """
1218    MERCENARY_KIPCHAK_COUNT = 214
1219    """
1220    - Purpose: Total number of mercenary kipchak creatable
1221    
1222    - Note: Researching Cuman Mercenaries sets this to 10. Making mercenary Kipchaks costs one unit of this resource
1223    """
1224    UNUSED_RESOURCE_215 = 215
1225    """
1226    - Purpose: Unused
1227    """
1228    SHEPHERD_PRODUCTIVITY = 216
1229    """
1230    - Purpose: Amount of food collected from sheep multiplier
1231    
1232    - Defaults:
1233    
1234        - 1: Default
1235        - 1.57: Tatars
1236    
1237    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Tatars, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 57%
1238    """
1239    SHARED_LINE_OF_SIGHT = 217
1240    """
1241    - Purpose: Unused
1242    """
1243    EARLY_TOWN_CENTER_LIMIT = 218
1244    """
1245    - Purpose: This is the number of extra TCs a player is allowed to build IF TCs are enabled in feudal age
1246    
1247    - Defaults:
1248    
1249        - 1: Default
1250        - 2: Cumans
1251    
1252    - Note: Since generic civs don't get access to TCs in feudal, the 10k amount doesn't matter, but if you're trying to make a map where you want people to be able to make TCs in feudal, make sure to set this value to 10k for cumans!
1253    """
1254    FISHING_PRODUCTIVITY = 219
1255    """
1256    - Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered by fishing ships
1257    
1258    - Defaults:
1259    
1260        - 1: Default
1261    
1262    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a fishing ship, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate
1263    """
1264    UNUSED_RESOURCE_220 = 220
1265    """
1266    - Purpose: Unused
1267    """
1268    MONUMENT_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 221
1269    """
1270    - Purpose: Monument food trickle rate multiplier
1271    
1272    - Defaults:
1273    
1274        - 1: In KoTH games
1275    
1276    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * food_trickle_from_monument`
1277    """
1278    MONUMENT_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 222
1279    """
1280    - Purpose: Monument wood trickle rate multiplier
1281    
1282    - Defaults:
1283    
1284        - 1: In KoTH games
1285    
1286    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * wood_trickle_from_monument`
1287    """
1288    MONUMENT_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 223
1289    """
1290    - Purpose: Monument stone trickle rate multiplier
1291    
1292    - Defaults:
1293    
1294        - 1: In KoTH games
1295    
1296    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * stone_trickle_from_monument`
1297    """
1298    MONUMENT_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 224
1299    """
1300    - Purpose: Monument gold trickle rate multiplier
1301    
1302    - Defaults:
1303    
1304        - 1: In KoTH games
1305    
1306    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * gold_trickle_from_monument`
1307    """
1308    RELIC_FOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 225
1309    """
1310    - Purpose: Relic food production per minute
1311    
1312    - Defaults:
1313    
1314        - 0: Default
1315        - 30: Burgundians
1316        - 15: Burgundians after getting hit with Atheism
1317    """
1318    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_GAIA = 226
1319    """
1320    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to gaia
1321    """
1322    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_ANIMALS = 227
1323    """
1324    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to wild animals
1325    """
1326    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_AI_PLAYER = 228
1327    """
1328    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to AIs
1329    """
1330    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_HUMAN_PLAYER = 229
1331    """
1332    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to human players
1333    """
1334    FOOD_GENERATION_RATE = 230
1335    """
1336    - Purpose: Free food trickle rate (per minute)
1337    """
1338    WOOD_GENERATION_RATE = 231
1339    """
1340    - Purpose: Free wood trickle rate (per minute)
1341    """
1342    STONE_GENERATION_RATE = 232
1343    """
1344    - Purpose: Free stone trickle rate (per minute)
1345    """
1346    GOLD_GENERATION_RATE = 233
1347    """
1348    - Purpose: Free gold trickle rate (per minute)
1349    """
1350    SPAWN_LIMIT = 234
1351    """
1352    - Purpose: The limit to the number of spawning buildings that can spawn units from spawn command in a technology
1353    
1354    - Note: This is usually overridden by techs
1355    """
1356    FLEMISH_MILITIA_POPULATION = 235
1357    """
1358    - Purpose: Number of alive flemish militia
1359    """
1360    FARMING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 236
1361    """
1362    - Purpose: Farming gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1363    
1364    - Defaults:
1365    
1366        - 0: Default
1367        - 2: (0.02 g/s per farmer) after Burgundian Vineyards
1368    
1369    - Note: Only generates gold while collecting food from farms, and not when walking on them down
1370    """
1371    FOLWARK_COLLECTION_AMOUNT = 237
1372    """
1373    - Purpose: This is the amount of food collected from farms built around a folwark
1374    
1375    - Defaults:
1376    
1377        - 0: Default
1378        - 17.5: Poles
1379        - 19.25: Poles with Chinese Ally
1380        - 25: Poles with Horse Collar
1381        - 27.5: Poles with Horse Collar & Chinese Ally
1382        - 37.5: Poles with Heavy Plow
1383        - 41.25: Poles with Heavy Plow & Chinese Ally
1384        - 55: Poles with Crop Rotation
1385        - 60.5: Poles with Crop Rotation & Chinese Ally
1386    """
1387    FOLWARK_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = 238
1388    """
1389    - Purpose: This is the ID of the resource that is given when a farm is constructed around a folwark
1390    
1391    - Defaults:
1392    
1393        - 0: Poles
1394        - -1: Default
1395    """
1396    FOLWARK_BUILDING_TYPE = 239
1397    """
1398    - Purpose: This is the ID of the building that the Folwark needs to upgrade from for the farm collection ability to work
1399    
1400    - Defaults:
1401    
1402        - 68: (Mill) Poles
1403        - -1: Default
1404    """
1405    UNITS_CONVERTED = 240
1406    """
1407    - Purpose: The amount of units lost to enemy conversions
1408    """
1409    STONE_MINING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 241
1410    """
1411    - Purpose: Stone mining gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1412    
1413    - Defaults:
1414    
1415        - 0: Default
1416        - 18: Poles
1417        - 20.7: Poles with Stone Mining
1418        - 23.805: Poles with Stone Shaft Mining
1419    """
1420    TRADE_WORKSHOP_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 242
1421    """
1422    - Purpose: Trade Workshop food production rate multiplier
1423    
1424    - Defaults:
1425    
1426        - 1: Default
1427    
1428    - Note: The amount of food obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_food_productivity * 2.25`
1429    """
1430    TRADE_WORKSHOP_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 243
1431    """
1432    - Purpose: Trade Workshop wood production rate multiplier
1433    
1434    - Defaults:
1435    
1436        - 1: Default
1437    
1438    - Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_wood_productivity * 2.25`
1439    """
1440    TRADE_WORKSHOP_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 244
1441    """
1442    - Purpose: Trade Workshop stone production rate multiplier
1443    
1444    - Defaults:
1445    
1446        - 0: Default
1447    
1448    - Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_stone_productivity * 2.25`
1449    """
1450    TRADE_WORKSHOP_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 245
1451    """
1452    - Purpose: Trade Workshop gold production rate multiplier
1453    
1454    - Defaults:
1455    
1456        - 1: Default
1457    
1458    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_gold_productivity * 2.25`
1459    """
1460    UNITS_VALUE_TOTAL = 246
1461    """
1462    - Purpose: Total cost of all units created so far
1463    
1464    - Note: This does **not** decrease when the units die
1465    """
1466    BUILDINGS_VALUE_TOTAL = 247
1467    """
1468    - Purpose: Total cost of all buildings created so far
1469    
1470    - Note: Increases when foundations are placed. This does **not** decrease if the foundation is deleted
1471    """
1472    VILLAGERS_CREATED_TOTAL = 248
1473    """
1474    - Purpose: Total number of villagers created so far
1475    """
1476    VILLAGERS_IDLE_PERIODS_TOTAL = 249
1477    """
1478    - Purpose: Amount of villagers that *entered* an idle state since game start
1479    
1480    - Note: 
1481    1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
1482    2. The number of villagers that *entered* an idle state since the last updated is added to this resource.
1483    3. Starting villager count is the initial value
1484    """
1485    VILLAGERS_IDLE_SECONDS_TOTAL = 250
1486    """
1487    - Purpose: Amount of total seconds all villagers have been idle since game start
1488    
1489    - Note: 
1490    1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
1491    2. The idle time in seconds for all villagers since the last time this resource was updated is added  to this resource.
1492    3. A villager immediately adds its own idle time to this resource if it dies
1493    """
1494    TRADE_FOOD_PERCENT = 251
1495    """
1496    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as food
1497    
1498    - Defaults:
1499    
1500        - 0: Default
1501        - 10: Bengalis
1502    """
1503    TRADE_WOOD_PERCENT = 252
1504    """
1505    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as wood
1506    
1507    - Defaults:
1508    
1509        - 0: Default
1510    """
1511    TRADE_STONE_PERCENT = 253
1512    """
1513    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as stone
1514    
1515    - Defaults:
1516    
1517        - 0: Default
1518    """
1519    LIVESTOCK_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 254
1520    """
1521    - Purpose: Garrisoned herdable food generation rate per 60 seconds
1522    
1523    - Defaults:
1524    
1525        - 0: Default
1526        - 3.5: (0.0583 f/s per herdable) Gurjaras
1527    """
1528    UNUSED_RESOURCE_255 = 255
1529    """
1530    - Purpose: Unused
1531    """
1532    UNUSED_RESOURCE_256 = 256
1533    """
1534    - Purpose: Unused
1535    """
1536    UNUSED_RESOURCE_257 = 257
1537    """
1538    - Purpose: Unused
1539    """
1540    UNUSED_RESOURCE_258 = 258
1541    """
1542    - Purpose: Unused
1543    """
1544    UNUSED_RESOURCE_259 = 259
1545    """
1546    - Purpose: Unused
1547    """
1548    UNUSED_RESOURCE_260 = 260
1549    """
1550    - Purpose: Unused
1551    """
1552    UNUSED_RESOURCE_261 = 261
1553    """
1554    - Purpose: Unused
1555    """
1556    CIVILIZATION_NAME_OVERRIDE = 262
1557    """
1558    - Purpose: 
1559    """
1560    STARTING_SCOUT_ID = 263
1561    """
1562    - Purpose: Unit ID for the starting scout. Can be set to any unit (even buildings)
1563    
1564    - Defaults:
1565    
1566        - 448: (Scout Cavalry) Default
1567        - 751: (Eagle Scout) Aztecs, Incas and Mayans
1568        - 1755: (Camel Scout) Gurjaras
1569    """
1570    RELIC_WOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 264
1571    """
1572    - Purpose: Relic wood production per minute
1573    
1574    - Defaults:
1575    
1576        - 0: Default
1577    
1578    - Note: This is not affected by Atheism
1579    """
1580    RELIC_STONE_PRODUCTION_RATE = 265
1581    """
1582    - Purpose: Relic stone production per minute
1583    
1584    - Note: This is not affected by Atheism
1585    """
1586    CHOPPING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 266
1587    """
1588    - Purpose: Lumberjack chopping gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1589    
1590    - Defaults:
1591    
1592        - 0: Default
1593        - 1.5: (0.015 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money
1594        - 1.8: (0.018 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe
1595        - 2.16: (0.0216 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw
1596        - 2.376: (0.02376 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw & Two-Man Saw
1597    
1598    - Note: Only generates gold while collecting wood from trees, and not when cutting them down
1599    """
1600    FORAGING_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 267
1601    """
1602    - Purpose: Forager foraging wood generation rate per 100 seconds
1603    
1604    - Defaults:
1605    
1606        - 0: Default
1607        - 10.4753: (0.104753 w/s per forager) Portuguese
1608    """
1609    HUNTER_PRODUCTIVITY = 268
1610    """
1611    - Purpose: Hunter hunting gold production rate per 100 seconds
1612    """
1613    TECHNOLOGY_REWARD_EFFECT = 269
1614    """
1615    - Purpose: This is the ID of an additional effect which will fire when any technology is researched
1616    """
1617    UNIT_REPAIR_COST = 270
1618    """
1619    - Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair siege units and ships
1620    """
1621    BUILDING_REPAIR_COST = 271
1622    """
1623    - Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair buildings
1624    """
1625    ELEVATION_HIGHER_DAMAGE = 272
1626    """
1627    - Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from higher elevation
1628    
1629    - Note: This is applied after the calculations from [Elevation Higher Bonus](./#211-elevation-higher-bonus) and [Elevation Lower Bonus](./#212-elevation-lower-bonus)
1630    """
1631    ELEVATION_LOWER_DAMAGE = 273
1632    """
1633    - Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from lower elevation
1634    
1635    - Note: This is applied after the calculations from [Elevation Higher Bonus](./#211-elevation-higher-bonus) and [Elevation Lower Bonus](./#212-elevation-lower-bonus)
1636    """
1637    INFANTRY_KILL_REWARD = 274
1638    """
1639    - Purpose: This resource currently effectively enables/disables gold generation per second by infantry killing villagers, trade units and monks
1640    
1641    - Defaults:
1642    
1643        - 0: All Civs
1644        - 1: Vikings after Chieftains
1645    
1646    - Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on infantry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is set to the different rates for different types of targets for infantry
1647    """
1648    UNUSED_RESOURCE_275 = 275
1649    """
1650    - Purpose: Unused
1651    """
1652    UNUSED_RESOURCE_276 = 276
1653    """
1654    - Purpose: Unused
1655    """
1656    RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS_DAMAGE = 277
1657    """
1658    - Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of fire damage done by demolition ships
1659    
1660    - Defaults:
1661    
1662        - 0: Before red cliffs tactics is researched
1663        - 1: After red cliffs tactics is researched
1664    
1665    - Note: This implies that converted units that are affected by the tech won't do fire damage after being converted
1666    """
1667    UNUSED_RESOURCE_278 = 278
1668    """
1669    - Purpose: Unused
1670    """
1671    MILITARY_CAN_CONVERT = 279
1672    """
1673    - Purpose: Military units with the conversion task can convert units if this is set to > 0 for a player
1674    """
1675    MILITARY_CONVERT_RANGE = 280
1676    """
1677    - Purpose: Adds to the conversion range of military units
1678    """
1679    MILITARY_CONVERT_CHANCE = 281
1680    """
1681    - Purpose: Determines the conversion probability per monk second
1682    """
1683    MILITARY_CONVERT_RECHARGE = 282
1684    """
1685    - Purpose: Determines the faith recharge rate after successful conversions
1686    """
1687    SPAWN_INSIDE = 283
1688    """
1689    - Purpose: Determines whenever spawned unit via `xsEffectAmount(cSpawnUnit,...)` or certain techs is spawned garrisoned or outside
1690    
1691    - Defaults:
1692    
1693        - 0: All Civs
1694        - 1: Set briefly for the Armenians after their first Fortified Church is built to spawn the relic garrisoned.
1695    
1696    - Note: This is usually overridden by techs
1697    """
1698    CAVALRY_KILL_REWARD = 284
1699    """
1700    - Purpose: This resource effectively sets the gold generation rate per second by cavalry fighting other military units
1701    
1702    - Defaults:
1703    
1704        - 0: All Civs
1705    
1706    - Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on cavalry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is also what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is just set to 1 for cavalry.
1707    """
1708    SHARED_VISIBILITY = 285
1709    """
1710    - Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control LoS with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.
1711    
1712    - Note: This does not change LoS for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled
1713    """
1714    SHARED_EXPLORATION = 286
1715    """
1716    - Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control map exploration with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.
1717    
1718    - Note: This does not change exploration for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled
1719    """
1720    MILITARY_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 287
1721    """
1722    - Purpose: The amount of food generated by soldiers per 100 seconds
1723    """
1724    PASTURE_FOOD_AMOUNT = 288
1725    """
1726    - Purpose: Determines the amount of food pastures provide
1727    """
1728    PASTURE_ANIMAL_COUNT = 289
1729    """
1730    - Purpose: Determines the amount of animals on a pasture.
1731    """
1732    PASTURE_HERDER_COUNT = 290
1733    """
1734    - Purpose: Determines the maximum amount of villagers that can work at once on a pasture
1735    """
1736    CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY_UNUSED = 291
1737    """
1738    - Purpose: Unused - duplicate name, actually controlled by resource 502
1739    """
1740    ANIMAL_DECAY_PREVENTION = 292
1741    """
1742    - Purpose: Prevents animal corpses from losing food when being gathered by a villager
1743    """
1744    HERDER_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 293
1745    """
1746    - Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
1747    """
1748    SHEPHERD_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 294
1749    """
1750    - Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
1751    """
1752    UNUSED_RESOURCE_295 = 295

1754    - Purpose: Unused
1755    """

2701    """
2702    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2703    """
2704    MAXIMUM_POLEMARCHS = 501
2705    """
2706    - Purpose: Hidden resource that is part of the cost of Polemarch. Incremented when the Polemarch dies, decremented when a Polemarch is trained. Increment this value to allow training of more Polemarchs.
2707    
2708    - Defaults:
2709    
2710        - 0: Default
2711    """
2712    CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 502
2713    """
2714    - Purpose: Chopping food generation rate per 100 seconds.
2715    
2716    - Defaults:
2717    
2718        - 0: Default
2719        - 4: Athenians
2720    """
2721    TRADE_WOOD_PERCENTAGE = 503
2722    """
2723    - Purpose: Amount of trade will be returned as wood instead of gold.
2724    
2725    - Defaults:
2726    
2727        - 0: Default
2728        - 0.25: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans.
2729    
2730    - Note: Changed in the Battle of Greece civs Port by a toggle to 0.25, 0.5, and 0.75 or by researching equivalent tech in the editor. Setting it to 0.5 will return half the amount in gold and half in wood. Works for trade cogs only. Setting it to a value >= 1 will make it so no trade resources are returned.
2731    """
2732    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_504 = 504
2733    """
2734    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2735    """
2736    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_505 = 505
2737    """
2738    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2739    
2740    - Defaults:
2741    
2742        - 0: Default
2743        - 1: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans
2744    """
2745    ACHAMENIDS_TOWN_CENTER_UPGRADES = 506
2746    """
2747    - Purpose: Used as a local resource in Town Centers to know which of them have the Achamenids Town Center upgrade researched
2748    
2749    - Defaults:
2750    
2751        - 0: Default
2752        - 1: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans
2753    
2754    - Note: Local Town Center resource is changed when its tech is researched. As a side effect its global player value will be decremented every time a Town Center is destroyed.
2755    """
2756    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_507 = 507
2757    """
2758    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2759    
2760    - Defaults:
2761    
2762        - 0: Default
2763        - 1: Athenians
2764    
2765    - Note: Athenians start with it set to 1 by initial Economic Policy.
2766    """
2767    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_508 = 508
2768    """
2769    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2770    """
2771    BUILDING_LOOT_PRODUCTIVITY = 509
2772    """
2773    - Purpose: Gain gold when attacking buildings.
2774    
2775    - Defaults:
2776    
2777        - 0: Default
2778    
2779    - Note: Formula is unknown, but the higher the resource the faster the gold gain is.
2780    """
2781    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_510 = 510
2782    """
2783    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2784    
2785    - Defaults:
2786    
2787        - 1: Spartans
2788    
2789    - Note: Spartans start with it set to 1.
2790    """
2791    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_511 = 511
2792    """
2793    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2794    """

2829    - Purpose: Gives gold generation on kills to certain `Lysander's Raider` and probably other units. Similar to resource 550 and 551.
2830    
2831    - Defaults:
2832    
2833        - 1: Default
2834    """
2835    CASTLE_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 521
2836    """
2837    - Purpose: Castle gold production rate multiplier.
2838    
2839    - Defaults:
2840    
2841        - 0: Default
2842        - 1: After Peloponnesian League researched
2843    
2844    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of Castles is given by `n * castle_gold_productivity * 0.33333`.
2845    """
2846    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_522 = 522

2959    """
2960    - Purpose: Gives gold generation on kills to certain `Lysander's Raider`, `Camel Raider` and probably other units. Similar to resource 520 and 551.
2961    
2962    - Defaults:
2963    
2964        - 1: Default
2965    """
2966    UNIT_LOOT_PRODUCTIVITY = 551
2967    """
2968    - Purpose: Gain gold per unit killed.
2969    
2970    - Defaults:
2971    
2972        - 0: Default
2973        - 1: After Military Policy activated
2974    
2975    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from killing number of units `u` is `u * unit_loot_productivity * 3`. Unlike resources 520 and 550 works on most units. Look at A.G.E. for units with 154 loot class task.
2976    """
2977    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_552 = 552

class Attribute(AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.dataset_enum._DataSetIntEnums): 
  12class Attribute(_DataSetIntEnums):
  13    """
  14    This enum class provides the integer values used to reference all the player resources in the game. Used in effects
  15    and conditions like 'Accumulate Attribute' and 'Modify Resource'
  16
  17    **Examples**
  18
  19    >>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE
  20    <Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE: 0>
  21
  22    You can also request the editor names of these player attributes (resources) to be used in <...> notation in
  23    trigger displays using:
  24
  25    >>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE.editor_name
  26    '!Food Storage'
  27    """
  28
  29    @property
  30    def editor_name(self):
  31        """
  32        The exact name of this resource in the editor. To be used in <...> notation in trigger displays
  33        """
  34        global _attribute_dataset_editor_names
  35
  36        if _attribute_dataset_editor_names is None:
  37            with (Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'sources' / 'resource_editor_names.json').open() as file:
  38                _attribute_dataset_editor_names = json.load(file)
  39
  40        return _attribute_dataset_editor_names[self]
  41
  42    FOOD_STORAGE = 0
  43    """
  44    - Purpose: Current food amount
  45    """
  46    WOOD_STORAGE = 1
  47    """
  48    - Purpose: Current wood amount
  49    """
  50    STONE_STORAGE = 2
  51    """
  52    - Purpose: Current stone amount
  53    """
  54    GOLD_STORAGE = 3
  55    """
  56    - Purpose: Current gold amount
  57    """
  58    POPULATION_HEADROOM = 4
  59    """
  60    - Purpose: Amount of free population space. Note that this is NOT the population cap
  61    """
  62    CONVERSION_RANGE = 5
  63    """
  64    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
  65    """
  66    CURRENT_AGE = 6
  67    """
  68    - Purpose: Controls the age name and icon at the top of the screen
  69    
  70    - Defaults:
  71    
  72        - 0: Dark Age
  73        - 1: Feudal Age
  74        - 2: Castle Age
  75        - 3: Imperial Age
  76    
  77    - Note: Setting this to an amount higher than 3 cycles the icon but keeps the age at imperial
  78    """
  79    RELICS_CAPTURED = 7
  80    """
  81    - Purpose: Number of relics held
  82    """
  83    UNUSED_RESOURCE_008 = 8
  84    """
  85    - Purpose: Unused
  86    """
  87    TRADE_GOODS = 9
  88    """
  89    - Purpose: Unused
  90    """
  91    UNUSED_RESOURCE_010 = 10
  92    """
  93    - Purpose: Unused
  94    """
  95    CURRENT_POPULATION = 11
  96    """
  97    - Purpose: The current population
  98    """
  99    CORPSE_DECAY_TIME = 12
 100    """
 101    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 102    """
 103    REMARKABLE_DISCOVERY = 13
 104    """
 105    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 106    """
 107    MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = 14
 108    """
 109    - Purpose: Number of monuments owned
 110    """
 111    MEAT_STORAGE = 15
 112    """
 113    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 114    """
 115    BERRY_STORAGE = 16
 116    """
 117    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 118    """
 119    FISH_STORAGE = 17
 120    """
 121    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 122    """
 123    UNUSED_RESOURCE_018 = 18
 124    """
 125    - Purpose: Unused
 126    """
 127    TOTAL_UNITS_OWNED = 19
 128    """
 129    - Purpose: Total units owned, excluding buildings
 130    """
 131    UNITS_KILLED = 20
 132    """
 133    - Purpose: Total units killed, excluding buildings
 134    """
 135    TECHNOLOGY_COUNT = 21
 136    """
 137    - Purpose: Number of technologies researched till now
 138    """
 139    PERCENT_MAP_EXPLORED = 22
 140    """
 141    - Purpose: Percentage of the map explored
 142    """
 143    CASTLE_AGE_TECH_ID = 23
 144    """
 145    - Purpose: Always 102
 146    
 147    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 148    """
 149    IMPERIAL_AGE_TECH_ID = 24
 150    """
 151    - Purpose: Always 103
 152    
 153    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 154    """
 155    FEUDAL_AGE_TECH_ID = 25
 156    """
 157    - Purpose: Always 101
 158    
 159    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 160    """
 161    ATTACK_WARNING_SOUND_ID = 26
 162    """
 163    - Purpose: Always 0
 164    
 165    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only
 166    """
 167    ENABLE_MONK_CONVERSION = 27
 168    """
 169    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy monk conversions
 170    
 171    - Defaults:
 172    
 173        - 0: No (default)
 174        - >= 1: Yes, after Atonement
 175    """
 176    ENABLE_BUILDING_CONVERSION = 28
 177    """
 178    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy building conversions
 179    
 180    - Defaults:
 181    
 182        - 0: No (default)
 183        - 1: Yes, after Redemption
 184        - >=2: Monks can convert buildings from range
 185    """
 186    ENABLE_SIEGE_CONVERSION = 29
 187    """
 188    - Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy siege conversions
 189    
 190    - Defaults:
 191    
 192        - 0: No (default)
 193        - 1: Yes, after Redemption
 194        - >=2: Monks can convert siege from range
 195    """
 196    UNUSED_RESOURCE_030 = 30
 197    """
 198    - Purpose: Unused
 199    """
 200    UNUSED_RESOURCE_031 = 31
 201    """
 202    - Purpose: Unused
 203    """
 204    BONUS_POPULATION_CAP = 32
 205    """
 206    - Purpose: Additional pop space to grant on top of maximum pop cap
 207    
 208    - Note: 10 for goths
 209    """
 210    EFFECT_FUNCTION_NUMBER = 33
 211    """
 212    - Purpose: Used to invoke functions in XS from data. When set to a non zero value `N`, it will automatically call a function named `EffectFunctionN` from the `Effects.xs` file.
 213    """
 214    UNUSED_RESOURCE_34 = 34
 215    """
 216    - Purpose: Unused
 217    """
 218    UNUSED_RESOURCE_35 = 35
 219    """
 220    - Purpose: Unused
 221    """
 222    FARM_FOOD_AMOUNT = 36
 223    """
 224    - Purpose: Maximum farm food amount
 225    
 226    - Defaults:
 227    
 228        - 175: Default
 229        - 220: Chinese
 230    
 231    - Note: This is what horse collar etc. technologies modify
 232    """
 233    CIVILIAN_POPULATION = 37
 234    """
 235    - Purpose: Current civilian population
 236    """
 237    VILLAGER_POPULATION = 38
 238    """
 239    - Purpose: Current villager population
 240    """
 241    ALL_TECHS_ACHIEVED = 39
 242    """
 243    - Purpose: Boolean: If all available technologies have been researched
 244    
 245    - Defaults:
 246    
 247        - 0: No
 248        - 1: Yes
 249    """
 250    MILITARY_POPULATION = 40
 251    """
 252    - Purpose: Current military popupation
 253    """
 254    CONVERSIONS = 41
 255    """
 256    - Purpose: Number of units converted
 257    """
 258    STANDING_WONDERS = 42
 259    """
 260    - Purpose: Number of standing wonders
 261    """
 262    RAZINGS = 43
 263    """
 264    - Purpose: Number of buildings razed
 265    """
 266    KILL_RATIO = 44
 267    """
 268    - Purpose: This is the number of units lost subtracted from the number of units killed in total
 269    """
 270    SURVIVAL_TO_FINISH = 45
 271    """
 272    - Purpose: Boolean: This is set to `0` under the same conditions which are required to defeat a player
 273    
 274    - Defaults:
 275    
 276        - 0: No
 277        - 1: Yes
 278    """
 279    TRIBUTE_INEFFICIENCY = 46
 280    """
 281    - Purpose: This is the fraction of tributes sent that are collected as tax
 282    
 283    - Defaults:
 284    
 285        - 0.3: Default
 286        - 0.2: After Coinage
 287        - 0: After Banking
 288    """
 289    GOLD_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = 47
 290    """
 291    - Purpose: Multiplier for gold mined by gold miners
 292    
 293    - Defaults:
 294    
 295        - 1: Default
 296        - 1.15: Mayans
 297    
 298    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
 299    """
 300    TOWN_CENTER_UNAVAILABLE = 48
 301    """
 302    - Purpose: Boolean: allow building extra tcs
 303    
 304    - Defaults:
 305    
 306        - 0: No (Sudden Death)
 307        - 1: Yes (Normal)
 308    """
 309    GOLD_COUNTER = 49
 310    """
 311    - Purpose: Total gold collected
 312    """
 313    REVEAL_ALLY = 50
 314    """
 315    - Purpose: Boolean: show ally los for the source player
 316    
 317    - Defaults:
 318    
 319        - 0: No (default)
 320        - 1: Yes, after Cartography or with a Portuguese ally
 321    
 322    - Note: Once set to `1`, setting it back to `0` won't take away the LoS of allies
 323    """
 324    UNUSED_RESOURCE_051 = 51
 325    """
 326    - Purpose: Unused
 327    """
 328    MONASTERIES = 52
 329    """
 330    - Purpose: Number of monasteries
 331    """
 332    TRIBUTE_SENT = 53
 333    """
 334    - Purpose: Total of all resources tributed to others. This does not count taxes paid on tributing
 335    """
 336    ALL_MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = 54
 337    """
 338    - Purpose: Boolean: all monuments on the map captured
 339    
 340    - Defaults:
 341    
 342        - 0: No
 343        - 1: Yes
 344    """
 345    ALL_RELICS_CAPTURED = 55
 346    """
 347    - Purpose: Boolean: all relics on the map captured
 348    
 349    - Defaults:
 350    
 351        - 0: No
 352        - 1: Yes
 353    """
 354    ORE_STORAGE = 56
 355    """
 356    - Purpose: Unused
 357    """
 358    KIDNAP_STORAGE = 57
 359    """
 360    - Purpose: Number of units kidnapped
 361    
 362    - Note: This is probably only used by mods, this usage may be incorrect
 363    """
 364    DARK_AGE_TECH_ID = 58
 365    """
 366    - Purpose: Always 104 
 367    
 368    - Note: Nothing happens when you change this
 369    """
 370    UNUSED_RESOURCE_059 = 59
 371    """
 372    - Purpose: Unused
 373    """
 374    UNUSED_RESOURCE_060 = 60
 375    """
 376    - Purpose: Unused
 377    """
 378    UNUSED_RESOURCE_061 = 61
 379    """
 380    - Purpose: Unused
 381    """
 382    BUILDING_HOUSING_RATE = 62
 383    """
 384    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 385    """
 386    TAX_GATHER_RATE = 63
 387    """
 388    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 389    """
 390    GATHER_ACCUMULATOR = 64
 391    """
 392    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 393    """
 394    SALVAGE_DECAY_RATE = 65
 395    """
 396    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
 397    """
 398    UNUSED_RESOURCE_066 = 66
 399    """
 400    - Purpose: Unused
 401    """
 402    CAN_CONVERT = 67
 403    """
 404    - Purpose: Boolean: monks can convert enemy units
 405    
 406    - Defaults:
 407    
 408        - 0: No
 409        - 1: Yes (default)
 410    """
 411    HIT_POINTS_KILLED = 68
 412    """
 413    - Purpose: Cumulative hp of all units killed
 414    """
 415    FARM_FOOD_MULTIPLIER = 69
 416    """
 417    - Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of extra food granted by mill upgrades
 418    
 419    - Defaults:
 420    
 421        - 1: No multiplier (default)
 422    """
 423    SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_X_COORDINATE = 70
 424    """
 425    - Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
 426    """
 427    SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_Y_COORDINATE = 71
 428    """
 429    - Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
 430    """
 431    UNUSED_RESOURCE_72 = 72
 432    """
 433    - Purpose: Unused
 434    """
 435    UNUSED_RESOURCE_73 = 73
 436    """
 437    - Purpose: Unused
 438    """
 439    UNUSED_RESOURCE_74 = 74
 440    """
 441    - Purpose: Unused
 442    """
 443    UNUSED_RESOURCE_75 = 75
 444    """
 445    - Purpose: Unused
 446    """
 447    UNUSED_RESOURCE_76 = 76
 448    """
 449    - Purpose: Unused
 450    """
 451    CONVERSION_RESISTANCE = 77
 452    """
 453    - Purpose: Coefficient of conversion resistance
 454    
 455    - Defaults:
 456    
 457        - 0: Default
 458    
 459    - Note: Probability of conversion every monk second is divided by this value for ALL source player units.
 460    """
 461    TRADE_VIG_RATE = 78
 462    """
 463    - Purpose: Market exchange rate fraction for the source player
 464    
 465    - Defaults:
 466    
 467        - 0.3: Default
 468        - 0.15: after Guilds
 469        - 0.05: Saracens
 470    """
 471    STONE_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = 79
 472    """
 473    - Purpose: Multiplier for stone mined by stone miners
 474    
 475    - Defaults:
 476    
 477        - 1: Default
 478        - 1.15: Mayans
 479    
 480    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
 481    """
 482    QUEUED_UNITS = 80
 483    """
 484    - Purpose: Amount of units in queue
 485    
 486    - Note: Note that only the units waiting to be trained are considered in the queue so if an archery range has 3 archers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 2 archers that are in queue
 487    """
 488    TRAINING_COUNT = 81
 489    """
 490    - Purpose: Amount of units being trained
 491    
 492    - Note: Note that only the FIRST unit in each building is considered as being trained so if a town centre has 4 villagers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 3 villagers that are in queue
 493    """
 494    START_WITH_UNIT_444_PTWC = 82
 495    """
 496    - Purpose: Boolean: started with PTWC
 497    
 498    - Note: Setting this to 1 in an RMS allows for starting with PTWC. Manually changing this in the editor does nothing
 499    """
 500    UNUSED_RESOURCE_83 = 83
 501    """
 502    - Purpose: Unused
 503    """
 504    STARTING_VILLAGERS = 84
 505    """
 506    - Purpose: Number of starting villagers
 507    
 508    - Defaults:
 509    
 510        - 3: Default
 511        - 4: Mayans
 512        - 6: Chinese
 513    
 514    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing
 515    """
 516    RESEARCH_COST_MODIFIER = 85
 517    """
 518    - Purpose: Multiply technology costs by this value
 519    
 520    - Defaults:
 521    
 522        - 1: Default
 523        - 0.9: Chinese in feudal age
 524        - 0.85: Chinese in castle age
 525        - 0.80: Chinese in imperial age
 526    """
 527    RESEARCH_TIME_MODIFIER = 86
 528    """
 529    - Purpose: Multiply technology research times by this value
 530    """
 531    CONVERT_BOATS = 87
 532    """
 533    - Purpose: Boolean: allow monks to convert boats
 534    
 535    - Defaults:
 536    
 537        - 0: No
 538        - 1: Yes (default)
 539    """
 540    FISH_TRAP_FOOD_AMOUNT = 88
 541    """
 542    - Purpose: Maximum fishtrap food amount
 543    
 544    - Defaults:
 545    
 546        - 710: Default
 547        - 2130: Malay
 548    """
 549    HEAL_RATE_MODIFIER = 89
 550    """
 551    - Purpose: Monk healing rate modifier
 552    
 553    - Defaults:
 554    
 555        - 0: The unit of measuremeant for this is unknown
 556    """
 557    HEALING_RANGE = 90
 558    """
 559    - Purpose: Monk heal range
 560    
 561    - Defaults:
 562    
 563        - 4: Tiles
 564    """
 565    STARTING_FOOD = 91
 566    """
 567    - Purpose: Starting food amount
 568    
 569    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting food amount
 570    """
 571    STARTING_WOOD = 92
 572    """
 573    - Purpose: Starting wood amount
 574    
 575    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting wood amount
 576    """
 577    STARTING_STONE = 93
 578    """
 579    - Purpose: Starting stone amount
 580    
 581    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting stone amount
 582    """
 583    STARTING_GOLD = 94
 584    """
 585    - Purpose: Starting gold amount
 586    
 587    - Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting gold amount
 588    """
 589    ENABLE_PTWC_KIDNAP_LOOT = 95
 590    """
 591    - Purpose: Enable town centre packing for the source player
 592    
 593    - Defaults:
 594    
 595        - 0: Default
 596        - 1: Allows the TC to be packed and moved
 597        - >=2: No noticeable effect
 598    
 599    - Note: Enabling kidnap/loot requires modding the units to have the kidnap/pillage action
 600    """
 601    NO_DROPSITE_FARMERS = 96
 602    """
 603    - Purpose: Enable Khmer farmer bonus
 604    
 605    - Defaults:
 606    
 607        - 0: Default
 608        - 1: Khmer. Farmers no longer need dropoff and steadily gain resources while farming
 609    """
 610    DOMINANT_SHEEP_CONTROL = 97
 611    """
 612    - Purpose: Boolean: force sheep conversion
 613    
 614    - Defaults:
 615    
 616        - 0: Default
 617        - >=1: Celts
 618    
 619    - Note: If this is set to a non zero value, other players' sheep convert to you even if they have a unit in their LOS, unless this is also a non zero value for them. Celt sheep bonus
 620    """
 621    BUILDING_COST_SUM = 98
 622    """
 623    - Purpose: Total cost of all units and buildings owned
 624    """
 625    TECH_COST_SUM = 99
 626    """
 627    - Purpose: Total cost of all researches researched
 628    """
 629    RELIC_INCOME_SUM = 100
 630    """
 631    - Purpose: Total relic gold generated
 632    """
 633    TRADE_INCOME_SUM = 101
 634    """
 635    - Purpose: Total trade gold generated
 636    """
