 893    FOOD_TOTAL = 166
 894    """
 895    - Purpose: Total food collected
 896    """
 897    WOOD_TOTAL = 167
 898    """
 899    - Purpose: Total wood collected
 900    """
 901    STONE_TOTAL = 168
 902    """
 903    - Purpose: Total stone collected
 904    """
 905    GOLD_TOTAL = 169
 906    """
 907    - Purpose: Total gold collected
 908    """
 909    TOTAL_VALUE_OF_KILLS = 170
 910    """
 911    - Purpose: Total cost of all units killed
 912    """
 913    TOTAL_TRIBUTE_RECEIVED = 171
 914    """
 915    - Purpose: Total of all resources received in tribute
 916    """
 917    TOTAL_VALUE_OF_RAZINGS = 172
 918    """
 919    - Purpose: Total cost of all buildings destroyed
 920    """
 921    TOTAL_CASTLES_BUILT = 173
 922    """
 923    - Purpose: Number of total castles built
 924    """
 925    TOTAL_WONDERS_BUILT = 174
 926    """
 927    - Purpose: Number of total wonders built
 928    """
 929    TRIBUTE_SCORE = 175
 930    """
 931    - Purpose: Total amount of resources sent in tribute including taxes. 10% of this is counted towards the economy score
 932    """
 933    CONVERT_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = 176
 934    """
 935    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is even possible
 936    
 937    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West
 938    """
 939    CONVERT_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = 177
 940    """
 941    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is forced
 942    
 943    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West
 944    """
 945    CONVERT_RESIST_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = 178
 946    """
 947    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is even possible
 948    
 949    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West
 950    """
 951    CONVERT_RESIST_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = 179
 952    """
 953    - Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is forced
 954    
 955    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West.
 956    """
 957    CONVERT_BUILDING_MIN = 180
 958    """
 959    - Purpose: Minimum time required to convert a building
 960    
 961    - Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 962    """
 963    CONVERT_BUILDING_MAX = 181
 964    """
 965    - Purpose: Maximum time required to convert a building
 966    
 967    - Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 968    """
 969    CONVERT_BUILDING_CHANCE = 182
 970    """
 971    - Purpose: Percent chance for monks to convert buildings
 972    
 973    - Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West
 974    """
 975    REVEAL_ENEMY = 183
 976    """
 977    - Purpose: Boolean: show enemy los for the source player
 978    
 979    - Defaults:
 980    
 981        - 0: No (default)
 982        - 1: Yes, after Spies
 983    
 984    - Note: Once set to `1`, setting it back to `0` won't take away LoS of enemies!
 985    """
 986    VALUE_WONDERS_CASTLES = 184
 987    """
 988    - Purpose: Total cost of all wonders and castles constructed
 989    """
 990    FOOD_SCORE = 185
 991    """
 992    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
 993    """
 994    WOOD_SCORE = 186
 995    """
 996    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
 997    """
 998    STONE_SCORE = 187
 999    """
1000    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
1001    """
1002    GOLD_SCORE = 188
1003    """
1004    - Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
1005    """
1006    CHOPPING_PRODUCTIVITY = 189
1007    """
1008    - Purpose: Multiplier for wood chopped by lumberjacks
1009    
1010    - Defaults:
1011    
1012        - 1: Default
1013        - 1.15: Mayans
1014    
1015    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%
1016    """
1017    FOOD_GATHERING_PRODUCTIVITY = 190
1018    """
1019    - Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered from all sources
1020    
1021    - Defaults:
1022    
1023        - 1: Default
1024        - 1.15: Mayans
1025    
1026    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%. The work rate for farmers is reduced by about 23.4%
1027    """
1028    RELIC_GOLD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 191
1029    """
1030    - Purpose: Relic gold generation rate in gold per minute
1031    
1032    - Defaults:
1033    
1034        - 30: Default. 30 gold per minute (0.5 gold per second)
1035        - 15: After getting hit with Atheism
1036    """
1037    CONVERTED_UNITS_DIE = 192
1038    """
1039    - Purpose: Boolean: converted units die instead of switching over to the enemy
1040    
1041    - Defaults:
1042    
1043        - 0: No (default)
1044        - 1: Yes, after Heresey
1045    """
1046    THEOCRACY = 193
1047    """
1048    - Purpose: Boolean: only one monk needs to regen faith after group conversion for the source player
1049    
1050    - Defaults:
1051    
1052        - 0: No (default)
1053        - 1: Yes, after researching Theocracy
1054    """
1055    UNUSED_RESOURCE_194 = 194
1056    """
1057    - Purpose: Unused
1058    """
1059    CONSTRUCTION_RATE_MODIFIER = 195
1060    """
1061    - Purpose: Builder work rate multiplier
1062    
1063    - Defaults:
1064    
1065        - 0: Default
1066        - 1.3: Spanish
1067    
1068    - Note: The actual work rate for builders is given by `construction_rate_mod * builder.default_work_rate`
1069    """
1070    HUN_WONDER_DISCOUNT = 196
1071    """
1072    - Purpose: Additional time required for relic/wonder victories in one tenth of a year
1073    
1074    - Defaults:
1075    
1076        - 0: default
1077        - 1000: (100 years) for the Hun player, after researching atheism. The value of this resource of each player is added to determine the total extra time for relic/wonder victories, i.e. it adds up if multiple hun players get the tech
1078    
1079    - Note: Internally, relic and wonder victory countdowns are measured in one tenths of an year, the fractional part is just not shown ingame
1080    """
1081    SPIES_DISCOUNT = 197
1082    """
1083    - Purpose: Boolean: Halves the cost of spies per villager, and caps it at 15k gold max instead of the usual 30k
1084    
1085    - Defaults:
1086    
1087        - 0: Default
1088    """
1089    UNUSED_RESOURCE_198 = 198
1090    """
1091    - Purpose: Unused
1092    """
1093    UNUSED_RESOURCE_199 = 199
1094    """
1095    - Purpose: Unused
1096    """
1097    UNUSED_RESOURCE_200 = 200
1098    """
1099    - Purpose: Unused
1100    """
1101    UNUSED_RESOURCE_201 = 201
1102    """
1103    - Purpose: Unused
1104    """
1105    UNUSED_RESOURCE_202 = 202
1106    """
1107    - Purpose: Unused
1108    """
1109    REVEAL_MAP = 203
1110    """
1111    - Purpose: Controls the map visibility for a player.
1112    
1113    - Defaults:
1114    
1115        - 0: Normal
1116        - 1: Explored
1117        - 2: All Visible
1118    """
1119    REVEAL_UNIT_ON_MAP = 204
1120    """
1121    - Purpose: Controls the visibility of other players' units for a player
1122    
1123    - Note: Positive IDs will reveal a unit temporarily only when it is created, Negative IDs will reveal a unit permanently
1124    """
1125    FEITORIA_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 205
1126    """
1127    - Purpose: Feitoria food production rate multiplier
1128    
1129    - Defaults:
1130    
1131        - 1: Default
1132    
1133    - Note: The amount of food obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_food_productivity * 1.6`
1134    """
1135    FEITORIA_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 206
1136    """
1137    - Purpose: Feitoria wood production rate multiplier
1138    
1139    - Defaults:
1140    
1141        - 1: Default
1142    
1143    - Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_wood_productivity * 0.7`
1144    """
1145    FEITORIA_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 207
1146    """
1147    - Purpose: Feitoria stone production rate multiplier
1148    
1149    - Defaults:
1150    
1151        - 1: Default
1152    
1153    - Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_stone_productivity * 0.3`
1154    """
1155    FEITORIA_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 208
1156    """
1157    - Purpose: Feitoria gold production rate multiplier
1158    
1159    - Defaults:
1160    
1161        - 1: Default
1162    
1163    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of Feitorias is given by `n * feitoria_gold_productivity * 1`
1164    """
1165    REVEAL_ENEMY_TOWN_CENTERS = 209
1166    """
1167    - Purpose: Boolean: reveal enemy town centre location for the source player
1168    
1169    - Defaults:
1170    
1171        - 0: Default
1172        - 5: Vietnamese
1173    
1174    - Note: The bonus works for all values >=1, the choice of setting it to 5 for vietnamese seems arbitrary
1175    """
1176    RELICS_VISIBLE_ON_MAP = 210
1177    """
1178    - Purpose: Boolean: reveal relics on map amount
1179    
1180    - Defaults:
1181    
1182        - -1: Default
1183        - 42: Burmese
1184    
1185    - Note: Burmese reveal relics on map bonus. Only works in RMS, manually changing this in the editor does not seem to have any effects
1186    """
1187    ELEVATION_HIGHER_BONUS = 211
1188    """
1189    - Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from higher elevation
1190    
1191    - Defaults:
1192    
1193        - 0: Default
1194        - 0.25: Tatars
1195    
1196    - Note: Damage that units on higher elevation deal to units on lower elevation is multiplied by `1.25 + elevation_bonus_higher`
1197    """
1198    ELEVATION_LOWER_BONUS = 212
1199    """
1200    - Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from lower elevation
1201    
1202    - Defaults:
1203    
1204        - 0: Default
1205    
1206    - Note: Damage that units on lower elevation deal to units on higher elevation is multiplied by `0.75 + elevation_bonus_lower`
1207    """
1208    RAIDING_PRODUCTIVITY = 213
1209    """
1210    - Purpose: Keshik gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1211    
1212    - Defaults:
1213    
1214        - 0: Default
1215        - 50: (0.5 g/s) Tatars
1216    
1217    - Note: Note that in practice, due to attack reload time and frame delay, Keshiks don't actually produce 0.5 g/s, but a slightly lower value
1218    """
1219    MERCENARY_KIPCHAK_COUNT = 214
1220    """
1221    - Purpose: Total number of mercenary kipchak creatable
1222    
1223    - Note: Researching Cuman Mercenaries sets this to 10. Making mercenary Kipchaks costs one unit of this resource
1224    """
1225    UNUSED_RESOURCE_215 = 215
1226    """
1227    - Purpose: Unused
1228    """
1229    SHEPHERD_PRODUCTIVITY = 216
1230    """
1231    - Purpose: Amount of food collected from sheep multiplier
1232    
1233    - Defaults:
1234    
1235        - 1: Default
1236        - 1.57: Tatars
1237    
1238    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Tatars, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 57%
1239    """
1240    SHARED_LINE_OF_SIGHT = 217
1241    """
1242    - Purpose: Unused
1243    """
1244    EARLY_TOWN_CENTER_LIMIT = 218
1245    """
1246    - Purpose: This is the number of extra TCs a player is allowed to build IF TCs are enabled in feudal age
1247    
1248    - Defaults:
1249    
1250        - 1: Default
1251        - 2: Cumans
1252    
1253    - Note: Since generic civs don't get access to TCs in feudal, the 10k amount doesn't matter, but if you're trying to make a map where you want people to be able to make TCs in feudal, make sure to set this value to 10k for cumans!
1254    """
1255    FISHING_PRODUCTIVITY = 219
1256    """
1257    - Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered by fishing ships
1258    
1259    - Defaults:
1260    
1261        - 1: Default
1262    
1263    - Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a fishing ship, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate
1264    """
1265    UNUSED_RESOURCE_220 = 220
1266    """
1267    - Purpose: Unused
1268    """
1269    MONUMENT_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 221
1270    """
1271    - Purpose: Monument food trickle rate multiplier
1272    
1273    - Defaults:
1274    
1275        - 1: In KoTH games
1276    
1277    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * food_trickle_from_monument`
1278    """
1279    MONUMENT_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 222
1280    """
1281    - Purpose: Monument wood trickle rate multiplier
1282    
1283    - Defaults:
1284    
1285        - 1: In KoTH games
1286    
1287    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * wood_trickle_from_monument`
1288    """
1289    MONUMENT_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 223
1290    """
1291    - Purpose: Monument stone trickle rate multiplier
1292    
1293    - Defaults:
1294    
1295        - 1: In KoTH games
1296    
1297    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * stone_trickle_from_monument`
1298    """
1299    MONUMENT_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 224
1300    """
1301    - Purpose: Monument gold trickle rate multiplier
1302    
1303    - Defaults:
1304    
1305        - 1: In KoTH games
1306    
1307    - Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is `0.7925 * gold_trickle_from_monument`
1308    """
1309    RELIC_FOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 225
1310    """
1311    - Purpose: Relic food production per minute
1312    
1313    - Defaults:
1314    
1315        - 0: Default
1316        - 30: Burgundians
1317        - 15: Burgundians after getting hit with Atheism
1318    """
1319    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_GAIA = 226
1320    """
1321    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to gaia
1322    """
1323    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_ANIMALS = 227
1324    """
1325    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to wild animals
1326    """
1327    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_AI_PLAYER = 228
1328    """
1329    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to AIs
1330    """
1331    VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_HUMAN_PLAYER = 229
1332    """
1333    - Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to human players
1334    """
1335    FOOD_GENERATION_RATE = 230
1336    """
1337    - Purpose: Free food trickle rate (per minute)
1338    """
1339    WOOD_GENERATION_RATE = 231
1340    """
1341    - Purpose: Free wood trickle rate (per minute)
1342    """
1343    STONE_GENERATION_RATE = 232
1344    """
1345    - Purpose: Free stone trickle rate (per minute)
1346    """
1347    GOLD_GENERATION_RATE = 233
1348    """
1349    - Purpose: Free gold trickle rate (per minute)
1350    """
1351    SPAWN_LIMIT = 234
1352    """
1353    - Purpose: The limit to the number of spawning buildings that can spawn units from spawn command in a technology
1354    
1355    - Note: This is usually overridden by techs
1356    """
1357    FLEMISH_MILITIA_POPULATION = 235
1358    """
1359    - Purpose: Number of alive flemish militia
1360    """
1361    FARMING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 236
1362    """
1363    - Purpose: Farming gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1364    
1365    - Defaults:
1366    
1367        - 0: Default
1368        - 2: (0.02 g/s per farmer) after Burgundian Vineyards
1369    
1370    - Note: Only generates gold while collecting food from farms, and not when walking on them down
1371    """
1372    FOLWARK_COLLECTION_AMOUNT = 237
1373    """
1374    - Purpose: This is the amount of food collected from farms built around a folwark
1375    
1376    - Defaults:
1377    
1378        - 0: Default
1379        - 17.5: Poles
1380        - 19.25: Poles with Chinese Ally
1381        - 25: Poles with Horse Collar
1382        - 27.5: Poles with Horse Collar & Chinese Ally
1383        - 37.5: Poles with Heavy Plow
1384        - 41.25: Poles with Heavy Plow & Chinese Ally
1385        - 55: Poles with Crop Rotation
1386        - 60.5: Poles with Crop Rotation & Chinese Ally
1387    """
1388    FOLWARK_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = 238
1389    """
1390    - Purpose: This is the ID of the resource that is given when a farm is constructed around a folwark
1391    
1392    - Defaults:
1393    
1394        - 0: Poles
1395        - -1: Default
1396    """
1397    FOLWARK_BUILDING_TYPE = 239
1398    """
1399    - Purpose: This is the ID of the building that the Folwark needs to upgrade from for the farm collection ability to work
1400    
1401    - Defaults:
1402    
1403        - 68: (Mill) Poles
1404        - -1: Default
1405    """
1406    UNITS_CONVERTED = 240
1407    """
1408    - Purpose: The amount of units lost to enemy conversions
1409    """
1410    STONE_MINING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 241
1411    """
1412    - Purpose: Stone mining gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1413    
1414    - Defaults:
1415    
1416        - 0: Default
1417        - 18: Poles
1418        - 20.7: Poles with Stone Mining
1419        - 23.805: Poles with Stone Shaft Mining
1420    """
1421    TRADE_WORKSHOP_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 242
1422    """
1423    - Purpose: Trade Workshop food production rate multiplier
1424    
1425    - Defaults:
1426    
1427        - 1: Default
1428    
1429    - Note: The amount of food obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_food_productivity * 2.25`
1430    """
1431    TRADE_WORKSHOP_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 243
1432    """
1433    - Purpose: Trade Workshop wood production rate multiplier
1434    
1435    - Defaults:
1436    
1437        - 1: Default
1438    
1439    - Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_wood_productivity * 2.25`
1440    """
1441    TRADE_WORKSHOP_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = 244
1442    """
1443    - Purpose: Trade Workshop stone production rate multiplier
1444    
1445    - Defaults:
1446    
1447        - 0: Default
1448    
1449    - Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_stone_productivity * 2.25`
1450    """
1451    TRADE_WORKSHOP_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 245
1452    """
1453    - Purpose: Trade Workshop gold production rate multiplier
1454    
1455    - Defaults:
1456    
1457        - 1: Default
1458    
1459    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by `n * tws_gold_productivity * 2.25`
1460    """
1461    UNITS_VALUE_TOTAL = 246
1462    """
1463    - Purpose: Total cost of all units created so far
1464    
1465    - Note: This does **not** decrease when the units die
1466    """
1467    BUILDINGS_VALUE_TOTAL = 247
1468    """
1469    - Purpose: Total cost of all buildings created so far
1470    
1471    - Note: Increases when foundations are placed. This does **not** decrease if the foundation is deleted
1472    """
1473    VILLAGERS_CREATED_TOTAL = 248
1474    """
1475    - Purpose: Total number of villagers created so far
1476    """
1477    VILLAGERS_IDLE_PERIODS_TOTAL = 249
1478    """
1479    - Purpose: Amount of villagers that *entered* an idle state since game start
1480    
1481    - Note: 
1482    1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
1483    2. The number of villagers that *entered* an idle state since the last updated is added to this resource.
1484    3. Starting villager count is the initial value
1485    """
1486    VILLAGERS_IDLE_SECONDS_TOTAL = 250
1487    """
1488    - Purpose: Amount of total seconds all villagers have been idle since game start
1489    
1490    - Note: 
1491    1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
1492    2. The idle time in seconds for all villagers since the last time this resource was updated is added  to this resource.
1493    3. A villager immediately adds its own idle time to this resource if it dies
1494    """
1495    TRADE_FOOD_PERCENT = 251
1496    """
1497    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as food
1498    
1499    - Defaults:
1500    
1501        - 0: Default
1502        - 10: Bengalis
1503    """
1504    TRADE_WOOD_PERCENT = 252
1505    """
1506    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as wood
1507    
1508    - Defaults:
1509    
1510        - 0: Default
1511    """
1512    TRADE_STONE_PERCENT = 253
1513    """
1514    - Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as stone
1515    
1516    - Defaults:
1517    
1518        - 0: Default
1519    """
1520    LIVESTOCK_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 254
1521    """
1522    - Purpose: Garrisoned herdable food generation rate per 60 seconds
1523    
1524    - Defaults:
1525    
1526        - 0: Default
1527        - 3.5: (0.0583 f/s per herdable) Gurjaras
1528    """
1529    UNUSED_RESOURCE_255 = 255
1530    """
1531    - Purpose: Unused
1532    """
1533    UNUSED_RESOURCE_256 = 256
1534    """
1535    - Purpose: Unused
1536    """
1537    UNUSED_RESOURCE_257 = 257
1538    """
1539    - Purpose: Unused
1540    """
1541    UNUSED_RESOURCE_258 = 258
1542    """
1543    - Purpose: Unused
1544    """
1545    UNUSED_RESOURCE_259 = 259
1546    """
1547    - Purpose: Unused
1548    """
1549    UNUSED_RESOURCE_260 = 260
1550    """
1551    - Purpose: Unused
1552    """
1553    UNUSED_RESOURCE_261 = 261
1554    """
1555    - Purpose: Unused
1556    """
1557    CIVILIZATION_NAME_OVERRIDE = 262
1558    """
1559    - Purpose: 
1560    """
1561    STARTING_SCOUT_ID = 263
1562    """
1563    - Purpose: Unit ID for the starting scout. Can be set to any unit (even buildings)
1564    
1565    - Defaults:
1566    
1567        - 448: (Scout Cavalry) Default
1568        - 751: (Eagle Scout) Aztecs, Incas and Mayans
1569        - 1755: (Camel Scout) Gurjaras
1570    """
1571    RELIC_WOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = 264
1572    """
1573    - Purpose: Relic wood production per minute
1574    
1575    - Defaults:
1576    
1577        - 0: Default
1578    
1579    - Note: This is not affected by Atheism
1580    """
1581    RELIC_STONE_PRODUCTION_RATE = 265
1582    """
1583    - Purpose: Relic stone production per minute
1584    
1585    - Note: This is not affected by Atheism
1586    """
1587    CHOPPING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 266
1588    """
1589    - Purpose: Lumberjack chopping gold generation rate per 100 seconds
1590    
1591    - Defaults:
1592    
1593        - 0: Default
1594        - 1.5: (0.015 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money
1595        - 1.8: (0.018 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe
1596        - 2.16: (0.0216 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw
1597        - 2.376: (0.02376 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw & Two-Man Saw
1598    
1599    - Note: Only generates gold while collecting wood from trees, and not when cutting them down
1600    """
1601    FORAGING_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 267
1602    """
1603    - Purpose: Forager foraging wood generation rate per 100 seconds
1604    
1605    - Defaults:
1606    
1607        - 0: Default
1608        - 10.4753: (0.104753 w/s per forager) Portuguese
1609    """
1610    HUNTER_PRODUCTIVITY = 268
1611    """
1612    - Purpose: Hunter hunting gold production rate per 100 seconds
1613    """
1614    TECHNOLOGY_REWARD_EFFECT = 269
1615    """
1616    - Purpose: This is the ID of an additional effect which will fire when any technology is researched
1617    """
1618    UNIT_REPAIR_COST = 270
1619    """
1620    - Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair siege units and ships
1621    """
1622    BUILDING_REPAIR_COST = 271
1623    """
1624    - Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair buildings
1625    """
1626    ELEVATION_HIGHER_DAMAGE = 272
1627    """
1628    - Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from higher elevation
1629    
1630    - Note: This is applied after the calculations from [Elevation Higher Bonus](./#211-elevation-higher-bonus) and [Elevation Lower Bonus](./#212-elevation-lower-bonus)
1631    """
1632    ELEVATION_LOWER_DAMAGE = 273
1633    """
1634    - Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from lower elevation
1635    
1636    - Note: This is applied after the calculations from [Elevation Higher Bonus](./#211-elevation-higher-bonus) and [Elevation Lower Bonus](./#212-elevation-lower-bonus)
1637    """
1638    INFANTRY_KILL_REWARD = 274
1639    """
1640    - Purpose: This resource currently effectively enables/disables gold generation per second by infantry killing villagers, trade units and monks
1641    
1642    - Defaults:
1643    
1644        - 0: All Civs
1645        - 1: Vikings after Chieftains
1646    
1647    - Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on infantry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is set to the different rates for different types of targets for infantry
1648    """
1649    UNUSED_RESOURCE_275 = 275
1650    """
1651    - Purpose: Unused
1652    """
1653    UNUSED_RESOURCE_276 = 276
1654    """
1655    - Purpose: Unused
1656    """
1657    RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS_DAMAGE = 277
1658    """
1659    - Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of fire damage done by demolition ships
1660    
1661    - Defaults:
1662    
1663        - 0: Before red cliffs tactics is researched
1664        - 1: After red cliffs tactics is researched
1665    
1666    - Note: This implies that converted units that are affected by the tech won't do fire damage after being converted
1667    """
1668    UNUSED_RESOURCE_278 = 278
1669    """
1670    - Purpose: Unused
1671    """
1672    MILITARY_CAN_CONVERT = 279
1673    """
1674    - Purpose: Military units with the conversion task can convert units if this is set to > 0 for a player
1675    """
1676    MILITARY_CONVERT_RANGE = 280
1677    """
1678    - Purpose: Adds to the conversion range of military units
1679    """
1680    MILITARY_CONVERT_CHANCE = 281
1681    """
1682    - Purpose: Determines the conversion probability per monk second
1683    """
1684    MILITARY_CONVERT_RECHARGE = 282
1685    """
1686    - Purpose: Determines the faith recharge rate after successful conversions
1687    """
1688    SPAWN_INSIDE = 283
1689    """
1690    - Purpose: Determines whenever spawned unit via `xsEffectAmount(cSpawnUnit,...)` or certain techs is spawned garrisoned or outside
1691    
1692    - Defaults:
1693    
1694        - 0: All Civs
1695        - 1: Set briefly for the Armenians after their first Fortified Church is built to spawn the relic garrisoned.
1696    
1697    - Note: This is usually overridden by techs
1698    """
1699    CAVALRY_KILL_REWARD = 284
1700    """
1701    - Purpose: This resource effectively sets the gold generation rate per second by cavalry fighting other military units
1702    
1703    - Defaults:
1704    
1705        - 0: All Civs
1706    
1707    - Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on cavalry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is also what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is just set to 1 for cavalry.
1708    """
1709    SHARED_VISIBILITY = 285
1710    """
1711    - Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control LoS with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.
1712    
1713    - Note: This does not change LoS for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled
1714    """
1715    SHARED_EXPLORATION = 286
1716    """
1717    - Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control map exploration with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.
1718    
1719    - Note: This does not change exploration for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled
1720    """
1721    MILITARY_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 287
1722    """
1723    - Purpose: The amount of food generated by soldiers per 100 seconds
1724    """
1725    PASTURE_FOOD_AMOUNT = 288
1726    """
1727    - Purpose: Determines the amount of food pastures provide
1728    """
1729    PASTURE_ANIMAL_COUNT = 289
1730    """
1731    - Purpose: Determines the amount of animals on a pasture.
1732    """
1733    PASTURE_HERDER_COUNT = 290
1734    """
1735    - Purpose: Determines the maximum amount of villagers that can work at once on a pasture
1736    """
1737    CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY_UNUSED = 291
1738    """
1739    - Purpose: Unused - duplicate name, actually controlled by resource 502
1740    """
1741    ANIMAL_DECAY_PREVENTION = 292
1742    """
1743    - Purpose: Prevents animal corpses from losing food when being gathered by a villager
1744    """
1745    HERDER_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 293
1746    """
1747    - Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
1748    """
1749    SHEPHERD_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 294
1750    """
1751    - Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
1752    """
1753    UNUSED_RESOURCE_295 = 295

1755    - Purpose: Unused
1756    """
1757    UNUSED_RESOURCE_296 = 296

2701    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_500 = 500
2702    """
2703    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2704    """
2705    MAXIMUM_POLEMARCHS = 501
2706    """
2707    - Purpose: Hidden resource that is part of the cost of Polemarch. Incremented when the Polemarch dies, decremented when a Polemarch is trained. Increment this value to allow training of more Polemarchs.
2708    
2709    - Defaults:
2710    
2711        - 0: Default
2712    """
2713    CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = 502
2714    """
2715    - Purpose: Chopping food generation rate per 100 seconds.
2716    
2717    - Defaults:
2718    
2719        - 0: Default
2720        - 4: Athenians
2721    """
2722    TRADE_WOOD_PERCENTAGE = 503
2723    """
2724    - Purpose: Amount of trade will be returned as wood instead of gold.
2725    
2726    - Defaults:
2727    
2728        - 0: Default
2729        - 0.25: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans.
2730    
2731    - Note: Changed in the Battle of Greece civs Port by a toggle to 0.25, 0.5, and 0.75 or by researching equivalent tech in the editor. Setting it to 0.5 will return half the amount in gold and half in wood. Works for trade cogs only. Setting it to a value >= 1 will make it so no trade resources are returned.
2732    """
2733    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_504 = 504
2734    """
2735    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2736    """
2737    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_505 = 505
2738    """
2739    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2740    
2741    - Defaults:
2742    
2743        - 0: Default
2744        - 1: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans
2745    """
2746    ACHAMENIDS_TOWN_CENTER_UPGRADES = 506
2747    """
2748    - Purpose: Used as a local resource in Town Centers to know which of them have the Achamenids Town Center upgrade researched
2749    
2750    - Defaults:
2751    
2752        - 0: Default
2753        - 1: Achaemenids, Athenians and Spartans
2754    
2755    - Note: Local Town Center resource is changed when its tech is researched. As a side effect its global player value will be decremented every time a Town Center is destroyed.
2756    """
2757    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_507 = 507
2758    """
2759    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2760    
2761    - Defaults:
2762    
2763        - 0: Default
2764        - 1: Athenians
2765    
2766    - Note: Athenians start with it set to 1 by initial Economic Policy.
2767    """
2768    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_508 = 508
2769    """
2770    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2771    """
2772    BUILDING_LOOT_PRODUCTIVITY = 509
2773    """
2774    - Purpose: Gain gold when attacking buildings.
2775    
2776    - Defaults:
2777    
2778        - 0: Default
2779    
2780    - Note: Formula is unknown, but the higher the resource the faster the gold gain is.
2781    """
2782    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_510 = 510
2783    """
2784    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2785    
2786    - Defaults:
2787    
2788        - 1: Spartans
2789    
2790    - Note: Spartans start with it set to 1.
2791    """
2792    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_511 = 511
2793    """
2794    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
2795    """

2829    """
2830    - Purpose: Gives gold generation on kills to certain `Lysander's Raider` and probably other units. Similar to resource 550 and 551.
2831    
2832    - Defaults:
2833    
2834        - 1: Default
2835    """
2836    CASTLE_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = 521
2837    """
2838    - Purpose: Castle gold production rate multiplier.
2839    
2840    - Defaults:
2841    
2842        - 0: Default
2843        - 1: After Peloponnesian League researched
2844    
2845    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning `n` number of Castles is given by `n * castle_gold_productivity * 0.33333`.
2846    """
2847    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_522 = 522

2960    """
2961    - Purpose: Gives gold generation on kills to certain `Lysander's Raider`, `Camel Raider` and probably other units. Similar to resource 520 and 551.
2962    
2963    - Defaults:
2964    
2965        - 1: Default
2966    """
2967    UNIT_LOOT_PRODUCTIVITY = 551
2968    """
2969    - Purpose: Gain gold per unit killed.
2970    
2971    - Defaults:
2972    
2973        - 0: Default
2974        - 1: After Military Policy activated
2975    
2976    - Note: The amount of gold obtained from killing number of units `u` is `u * unit_loot_productivity * 3`. Unlike resources 520 and 550 works on most units. Look at A.G.E. for units with 154 loot class task.
2977    """
2978    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_552 = 552

2980    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?

3116    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3117    """
3118    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_587 = 587
3119    """
3120    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3121    """
3122    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_588 = 588
3123    """
3124    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3125    """
3126    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_589 = 589
3127    """
3128    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3129    """
3130    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_590 = 590
3131    """
3132    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3133    """
3134    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_591 = 591
3135    """
3136    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3137    """
3138    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_592 = 592
3139    """
3140    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3141    """
3142    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_593 = 593
3143    """
3144    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3145    """
3146    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_594 = 594
3147    """
3148    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3149    """
3150    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_595 = 595
3151    """
3152    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3153    """
3154    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_596 = 596
3155    """
3156    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3157    """
3158    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_597 = 597
3159    """
3160    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3161    """
3162    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_598 = 598
3163    """
3164    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3165    """
3166    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_599 = 599
3167    """
3168    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3169    """
3170    UNKNOWN_RESOURCE_600 = 600
3171    """
3172    - Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
3173    """

This enum class provides the integer values used to reference all the player resources in the game. Used in effects and conditions like 'Accumulate Attribute' and 'Modify Resource'

Examples

>>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE
<Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE: 0>

You can also request the editor names of these player attributes (resources) to be used in <...> notation in trigger displays using:

>>> Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE.editor_name
'!Food Storage'
editor_name 
29    @property
30    def editor_name(self):
31        """
32        The exact name of this resource in the editor. To be used in <...> notation in trigger displays
33        """
34        global _attribute_dataset_editor_names
35
36        if _attribute_dataset_editor_names is None:
37            with (Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'sources' / 'resource_editor_names.json').open() as file:
38                _attribute_dataset_editor_names = json.load(file)
39
40        return _attribute_dataset_editor_names[self]

The exact name of this resource in the editor. To be used in <...> notation in trigger displays

FOOD_STORAGE = <Attribute.FOOD_STORAGE: 0>
  • Purpose: Current food amount
WOOD_STORAGE = <Attribute.WOOD_STORAGE: 1>
  • Purpose: Current wood amount
STONE_STORAGE = <Attribute.STONE_STORAGE: 2>
  • Purpose: Current stone amount
GOLD_STORAGE = <Attribute.GOLD_STORAGE: 3>
  • Purpose: Current gold amount
POPULATION_HEADROOM = <Attribute.POPULATION_HEADROOM: 4>
  • Purpose: Amount of free population space. Note that this is NOT the population cap
CONVERSION_RANGE = <Attribute.CONVERSION_RANGE: 5>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
CURRENT_AGE = <Attribute.CURRENT_AGE: 6>

  • Purpose: Controls the age name and icon at the top of the screen

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Dark Age
    • 1: Feudal Age
    • 2: Castle Age
    • 3: Imperial Age

  • Note: Setting this to an amount higher than 3 cycles the icon but keeps the age at imperial

RELICS_CAPTURED = <Attribute.RELICS_CAPTURED: 7>
  • Purpose: Number of relics held
UNUSED_RESOURCE_008 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_008: 8>
  • Purpose: Unused
TRADE_GOODS = <Attribute.TRADE_GOODS: 9>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_010 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_010: 10>
  • Purpose: Unused
CURRENT_POPULATION = <Attribute.CURRENT_POPULATION: 11>
  • Purpose: The current population
CORPSE_DECAY_TIME = <Attribute.CORPSE_DECAY_TIME: 12>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
REMARKABLE_DISCOVERY = <Attribute.REMARKABLE_DISCOVERY: 13>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = <Attribute.MONUMENTS_CAPTURED: 14>
  • Purpose: Number of monuments owned
MEAT_STORAGE = <Attribute.MEAT_STORAGE: 15>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
BERRY_STORAGE = <Attribute.BERRY_STORAGE: 16>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
FISH_STORAGE = <Attribute.FISH_STORAGE: 17>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
UNUSED_RESOURCE_018 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_018: 18>
  • Purpose: Unused
TOTAL_UNITS_OWNED = <Attribute.TOTAL_UNITS_OWNED: 19>
  • Purpose: Total units owned, excluding buildings
UNITS_KILLED = <Attribute.UNITS_KILLED: 20>
  • Purpose: Total units killed, excluding buildings
TECHNOLOGY_COUNT = <Attribute.TECHNOLOGY_COUNT: 21>
  • Purpose: Number of technologies researched till now
PERCENT_MAP_EXPLORED = <Attribute.PERCENT_MAP_EXPLORED: 22>
  • Purpose: Percentage of the map explored
CASTLE_AGE_TECH_ID = <Attribute.CASTLE_AGE_TECH_ID: 23>

  • Purpose: Always 102

  • Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only

IMPERIAL_AGE_TECH_ID = <Attribute.IMPERIAL_AGE_TECH_ID: 24>

  • Purpose: Always 103

  • Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only

FEUDAL_AGE_TECH_ID = <Attribute.FEUDAL_AGE_TECH_ID: 25>

  • Purpose: Always 101

  • Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only

ATTACK_WARNING_SOUND_ID = <Attribute.ATTACK_WARNING_SOUND_ID: 26>

  • Purpose: Always 0

  • Note: Nothing happens when you change this, probably for mods only

ENABLE_MONK_CONVERSION = <Attribute.ENABLE_MONK_CONVERSION: 27>

  • Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy monk conversions

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • >= 1: Yes, after Atonement
ENABLE_BUILDING_CONVERSION = <Attribute.ENABLE_BUILDING_CONVERSION: 28>

  • Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy building conversions

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after Redemption
    • >=2: Monks can convert buildings from range
ENABLE_SIEGE_CONVERSION = <Attribute.ENABLE_SIEGE_CONVERSION: 29>

  • Purpose: Boolean: allow enemy siege conversions

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after Redemption
    • >=2: Monks can convert siege from range
UNUSED_RESOURCE_030 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_030: 30>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_031 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_031: 31>
  • Purpose: Unused
BONUS_POPULATION_CAP = <Attribute.BONUS_POPULATION_CAP: 32>

  • Purpose: Additional pop space to grant on top of maximum pop cap

  • Note: 10 for goths

EFFECT_FUNCTION_NUMBER = <Attribute.EFFECT_FUNCTION_NUMBER: 33>
  • Purpose: Used to invoke functions in XS from data. When set to a non zero value N, it will automatically call a function named EffectFunctionN from the Effects.xs file.
UNUSED_RESOURCE_34 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_34: 34>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_35 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_35: 35>
  • Purpose: Unused
FARM_FOOD_AMOUNT = <Attribute.FARM_FOOD_AMOUNT: 36>

  • Purpose: Maximum farm food amount

  • Defaults:

    • 175: Default
    • 220: Chinese

  • Note: This is what horse collar etc. technologies modify

CIVILIAN_POPULATION = <Attribute.CIVILIAN_POPULATION: 37>
  • Purpose: Current civilian population
VILLAGER_POPULATION = <Attribute.VILLAGER_POPULATION: 38>
  • Purpose: Current villager population
ALL_TECHS_ACHIEVED = <Attribute.ALL_TECHS_ACHIEVED: 39>

  • Purpose: Boolean: If all available technologies have been researched

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes
MILITARY_POPULATION = <Attribute.MILITARY_POPULATION: 40>
  • Purpose: Current military popupation
CONVERSIONS = <Attribute.CONVERSIONS: 41>
  • Purpose: Number of units converted
STANDING_WONDERS = <Attribute.STANDING_WONDERS: 42>
  • Purpose: Number of standing wonders
RAZINGS = <Attribute.RAZINGS: 43>
  • Purpose: Number of buildings razed
KILL_RATIO = <Attribute.KILL_RATIO: 44>
  • Purpose: This is the number of units lost subtracted from the number of units killed in total
SURVIVAL_TO_FINISH = <Attribute.SURVIVAL_TO_FINISH: 45>

  • Purpose: Boolean: This is set to 0 under the same conditions which are required to defeat a player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes
TRIBUTE_INEFFICIENCY = <Attribute.TRIBUTE_INEFFICIENCY: 46>

  • Purpose: This is the fraction of tributes sent that are collected as tax

  • Defaults:

    • 0.3: Default
    • 0.2: After Coinage
    • 0: After Banking
GOLD_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.GOLD_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY: 47>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for gold mined by gold miners

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 1.15: Mayans

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%

TOWN_CENTER_UNAVAILABLE = <Attribute.TOWN_CENTER_UNAVAILABLE: 48>

  • Purpose: Boolean: allow building extra tcs

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (Sudden Death)
    • 1: Yes (Normal)
GOLD_COUNTER = <Attribute.GOLD_COUNTER: 49>
  • Purpose: Total gold collected
REVEAL_ALLY = <Attribute.REVEAL_ALLY: 50>

  • Purpose: Boolean: show ally los for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after Cartography or with a Portuguese ally

  • Note: Once set to 1, setting it back to 0 won't take away the LoS of allies

UNUSED_RESOURCE_051 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_051: 51>
  • Purpose: Unused
MONASTERIES = <Attribute.MONASTERIES: 52>
  • Purpose: Number of monasteries
TRIBUTE_SENT = <Attribute.TRIBUTE_SENT: 53>
  • Purpose: Total of all resources tributed to others. This does not count taxes paid on tributing
ALL_MONUMENTS_CAPTURED = <Attribute.ALL_MONUMENTS_CAPTURED: 54>

  • Purpose: Boolean: all monuments on the map captured

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes
ALL_RELICS_CAPTURED = <Attribute.ALL_RELICS_CAPTURED: 55>

  • Purpose: Boolean: all relics on the map captured

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes
ORE_STORAGE = <Attribute.ORE_STORAGE: 56>
  • Purpose: Unused
KIDNAP_STORAGE = <Attribute.KIDNAP_STORAGE: 57>

  • Purpose: Number of units kidnapped

  • Note: This is probably only used by mods, this usage may be incorrect

DARK_AGE_TECH_ID = <Attribute.DARK_AGE_TECH_ID: 58>

  • Purpose: Always 104

  • Note: Nothing happens when you change this

UNUSED_RESOURCE_059 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_059: 59>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_060 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_060: 60>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_061 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_061: 61>
  • Purpose: Unused
BUILDING_HOUSING_RATE = <Attribute.BUILDING_HOUSING_RATE: 62>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
TAX_GATHER_RATE = <Attribute.TAX_GATHER_RATE: 63>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
GATHER_ACCUMULATOR = <Attribute.GATHER_ACCUMULATOR: 64>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
SALVAGE_DECAY_RATE = <Attribute.SALVAGE_DECAY_RATE: 65>
  • Purpose: Unknown... What does this resource do?
UNUSED_RESOURCE_066 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_066: 66>
  • Purpose: Unused
CAN_CONVERT = <Attribute.CAN_CONVERT: 67>

  • Purpose: Boolean: monks can convert enemy units

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes (default)
HIT_POINTS_KILLED = <Attribute.HIT_POINTS_KILLED: 68>
  • Purpose: Cumulative hp of all units killed
FARM_FOOD_MULTIPLIER = <Attribute.FARM_FOOD_MULTIPLIER: 69>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of extra food granted by mill upgrades

  • Defaults:

    • 1: No multiplier (default)
SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_X_COORDINATE = <Attribute.SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_X_COORDINATE: 70>
  • Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_Y_COORDINATE = <Attribute.SOURCE_MARKET_OR_DOCK_Y_COORDINATE: 71>
  • Purpose: Controls the amount of gold that trade carts and trade cogs deposit, when the source market is changed
UNUSED_RESOURCE_72 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_72: 72>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_73 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_73: 73>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_74 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_74: 74>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_75 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_75: 75>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_76 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_76: 76>
  • Purpose: Unused
CONVERSION_RESISTANCE = <Attribute.CONVERSION_RESISTANCE: 77>

  • Purpose: Coefficient of conversion resistance

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default

  • Note: Probability of conversion every monk second is divided by this value for ALL source player units.

TRADE_VIG_RATE = <Attribute.TRADE_VIG_RATE: 78>

  • Purpose: Market exchange rate fraction for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0.3: Default
    • 0.15: after Guilds
    • 0.05: Saracens
STONE_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.STONE_MINING_PRODUCTIVITY: 79>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for stone mined by stone miners

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 1.15: Mayans

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%

QUEUED_UNITS = <Attribute.QUEUED_UNITS: 80>

  • Purpose: Amount of units in queue

  • Note: Note that only the units waiting to be trained are considered in the queue so if an archery range has 3 archers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 2 archers that are in queue

TRAINING_COUNT = <Attribute.TRAINING_COUNT: 81>

  • Purpose: Amount of units being trained

  • Note: Note that only the FIRST unit in each building is considered as being trained so if a town centre has 4 villagers being made, there is 1 archer that is being trained and 3 villagers that are in queue

START_WITH_UNIT_444_PTWC = <Attribute.START_WITH_UNIT_444_PTWC: 82>

  • Purpose: Boolean: started with PTWC

  • Note: Setting this to 1 in an RMS allows for starting with PTWC. Manually changing this in the editor does nothing

UNUSED_RESOURCE_83 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_83: 83>
  • Purpose: Unused
STARTING_VILLAGERS = <Attribute.STARTING_VILLAGERS: 84>

  • Purpose: Number of starting villagers

  • Defaults:

    • 3: Default
    • 4: Mayans
    • 6: Chinese

  • Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing

RESEARCH_COST_MODIFIER = <Attribute.RESEARCH_COST_MODIFIER: 85>

  • Purpose: Multiply technology costs by this value

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 0.9: Chinese in feudal age
    • 0.85: Chinese in castle age
    • 0.80: Chinese in imperial age
RESEARCH_TIME_MODIFIER = <Attribute.RESEARCH_TIME_MODIFIER: 86>
  • Purpose: Multiply technology research times by this value
CONVERT_BOATS = <Attribute.CONVERT_BOATS: 87>

  • Purpose: Boolean: allow monks to convert boats

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No
    • 1: Yes (default)
FISH_TRAP_FOOD_AMOUNT = <Attribute.FISH_TRAP_FOOD_AMOUNT: 88>

  • Purpose: Maximum fishtrap food amount

  • Defaults:

    • 710: Default
    • 2130: Malay
HEAL_RATE_MODIFIER = <Attribute.HEAL_RATE_MODIFIER: 89>

  • Purpose: Monk healing rate modifier

  • Defaults:

    • 0: The unit of measuremeant for this is unknown
HEALING_RANGE = <Attribute.HEALING_RANGE: 90>

  • Purpose: Monk heal range

  • Defaults:

    • 4: Tiles
STARTING_FOOD = <Attribute.STARTING_FOOD: 91>

  • Purpose: Starting food amount

  • Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting food amount

STARTING_WOOD = <Attribute.STARTING_WOOD: 92>

  • Purpose: Starting wood amount

  • Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting wood amount

STARTING_STONE = <Attribute.STARTING_STONE: 93>

  • Purpose: Starting stone amount

  • Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting stone amount

STARTING_GOLD = <Attribute.STARTING_GOLD: 94>

  • Purpose: Starting gold amount

  • Note: Only works for RMS, changing this manually in the editor does nothing but its a way to check starting gold amount

ENABLE_PTWC_KIDNAP_LOOT = <Attribute.ENABLE_PTWC_KIDNAP_LOOT: 95>

  • Purpose: Enable town centre packing for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 1: Allows the TC to be packed and moved
    • >=2: No noticeable effect

  • Note: Enabling kidnap/loot requires modding the units to have the kidnap/pillage action

NO_DROPSITE_FARMERS = <Attribute.NO_DROPSITE_FARMERS: 96>

  • Purpose: Enable Khmer farmer bonus

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 1: Khmer. Farmers no longer need dropoff and steadily gain resources while farming
DOMINANT_SHEEP_CONTROL = <Attribute.DOMINANT_SHEEP_CONTROL: 97>

  • Purpose: Boolean: force sheep conversion

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • >=1: Celts

  • Note: If this is set to a non zero value, other players' sheep convert to you even if they have a unit in their LOS, unless this is also a non zero value for them. Celt sheep bonus

BUILDING_COST_SUM = <Attribute.BUILDING_COST_SUM: 98>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all units and buildings owned
TECH_COST_SUM = <Attribute.TECH_COST_SUM: 99>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all researches researched
RELIC_INCOME_SUM = <Attribute.RELIC_INCOME_SUM: 100>
  • Purpose: Total relic gold generated
TRADE_INCOME_SUM = <Attribute.TRADE_INCOME_SUM: 101>
  • Purpose: Total trade gold generated
UNUSED_RESOURCE_102 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_102: 102>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_103 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_103: 103>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_104 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_104: 104>
  • Purpose: Unused

  • Purpose: Unused

  • Purpose: Unused
STANDING_CASTLES = <Attribute.STANDING_CASTLES: 134>
  • Purpose: Number of standing castles
HIT_POINTS_RAZED = <Attribute.HIT_POINTS_RAZED: 135>
  • Purpose: Total HP of all buildings destroyed
UNUSED_RESOURCE_136 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_136: 136>
  • Purpose: Unused

  • Purpose: Unused
VALUE_KILLED_BY_OTHERS = <Attribute.VALUE_KILLED_BY_OTHERS: 152>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all own units lost
VALUE_RAZED_BY_OTHERS = <Attribute.VALUE_RAZED_BY_OTHERS: 153>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all own buildings lost
KILLED_BY_OTHERS = <Attribute.KILLED_BY_OTHERS: 154>
  • Purpose: Number of own units killed by other players
RAZED_BY_OTHERS = <Attribute.RAZED_BY_OTHERS: 155>
  • Purpose: Number of own buildings destroyed by other players
UNUSED_RESOURCE_156 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_156: 156>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_157 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_157: 157>
  • Purpose: Unused

UNUSED_RESOURCE_163 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_163: 163>
  • Purpose: Unused
VALUE_CURRENT_UNITS = <Attribute.VALUE_CURRENT_UNITS: 164>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all own alive units
VALUE_CURRENT_BUILDINGS = <Attribute.VALUE_CURRENT_BUILDINGS: 165>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all own standing buildings
FOOD_TOTAL = <Attribute.FOOD_TOTAL: 166>
  • Purpose: Total food collected
WOOD_TOTAL = <Attribute.WOOD_TOTAL: 167>
  • Purpose: Total wood collected
STONE_TOTAL = <Attribute.STONE_TOTAL: 168>
  • Purpose: Total stone collected
GOLD_TOTAL = <Attribute.GOLD_TOTAL: 169>
  • Purpose: Total gold collected
TOTAL_VALUE_OF_KILLS = <Attribute.TOTAL_VALUE_OF_KILLS: 170>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all units killed
TOTAL_TRIBUTE_RECEIVED = <Attribute.TOTAL_TRIBUTE_RECEIVED: 171>
  • Purpose: Total of all resources received in tribute
TOTAL_VALUE_OF_RAZINGS = <Attribute.TOTAL_VALUE_OF_RAZINGS: 172>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all buildings destroyed
TOTAL_CASTLES_BUILT = <Attribute.TOTAL_CASTLES_BUILT: 173>
  • Purpose: Number of total castles built
TOTAL_WONDERS_BUILT = <Attribute.TOTAL_WONDERS_BUILT: 174>
  • Purpose: Number of total wonders built
TRIBUTE_SCORE = <Attribute.TRIBUTE_SCORE: 175>
  • Purpose: Total amount of resources sent in tribute including taxes. 10% of this is counted towards the economy score
CONVERT_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = <Attribute.CONVERT_MIN_ADJUSTMENT: 176>

  • Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is even possible

  • Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West

CONVERT_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = <Attribute.CONVERT_MAX_ADJUSTMENT: 177>

  • Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before a conversion is forced

  • Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=870 by T-West

CONVERT_RESIST_MIN_ADJUSTMENT = <Attribute.CONVERT_RESIST_MIN_ADJUSTMENT: 178>

  • Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is even possible

  • Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West

CONVERT_RESIST_MAX_ADJUSTMENT = <Attribute.CONVERT_RESIST_MAX_ADJUSTMENT: 179>

  • Purpose: Additional monk seconds needed before conversion by enemy monks is forced

  • Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=830 by T-West.

CONVERT_BUILDING_MIN = <Attribute.CONVERT_BUILDING_MIN: 180>

  • Purpose: Minimum time required to convert a building

  • Note: A great explanation of how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West

CONVERT_BUILDING_MAX = <Attribute.CONVERT_BUILDING_MAX: 181>

  • Purpose: Maximum time required to convert a building

  • Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West

CONVERT_BUILDING_CHANCE = <Attribute.CONVERT_BUILDING_CHANCE: 182>

  • Purpose: Percent chance for monks to convert buildings

  • Note: A great explanation for how this works: https://youtu.be/-qRUaOHpbwI?t=902 by T-West

REVEAL_ENEMY = <Attribute.REVEAL_ENEMY: 183>

  • Purpose: Boolean: show enemy los for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after Spies

  • Note: Once set to 1, setting it back to 0 won't take away LoS of enemies!

VALUE_WONDERS_CASTLES = <Attribute.VALUE_WONDERS_CASTLES: 184>
  • Purpose: Total cost of all wonders and castles constructed
FOOD_SCORE = <Attribute.FOOD_SCORE: 185>
  • Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
WOOD_SCORE = <Attribute.WOOD_SCORE: 186>
  • Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
STONE_SCORE = <Attribute.STONE_SCORE: 187>
  • Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
GOLD_SCORE = <Attribute.GOLD_SCORE: 188>
  • Purpose: Unknown... what does this resource do?
CHOPPING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.CHOPPING_PRODUCTIVITY: 189>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for wood chopped by lumberjacks

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 1.15: Mayans

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%

FOOD_GATHERING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FOOD_GATHERING_PRODUCTIVITY: 190>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered from all sources

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 1.15: Mayans

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Mayans, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 15%. The work rate for farmers is reduced by about 23.4%

RELIC_GOLD_PRODUCTION_RATE = <Attribute.RELIC_GOLD_PRODUCTION_RATE: 191>

  • Purpose: Relic gold generation rate in gold per minute

  • Defaults:

    • 30: Default. 30 gold per minute (0.5 gold per second)
    • 15: After getting hit with Atheism
CONVERTED_UNITS_DIE = <Attribute.CONVERTED_UNITS_DIE: 192>

  • Purpose: Boolean: converted units die instead of switching over to the enemy

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after Heresey
THEOCRACY = <Attribute.THEOCRACY: 193>

  • Purpose: Boolean: only one monk needs to regen faith after group conversion for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: No (default)
    • 1: Yes, after researching Theocracy
UNUSED_RESOURCE_194 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_194: 194>
  • Purpose: Unused
CONSTRUCTION_RATE_MODIFIER = <Attribute.CONSTRUCTION_RATE_MODIFIER: 195>

  • Purpose: Builder work rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 1.3: Spanish

  • Note: The actual work rate for builders is given by construction_rate_mod * builder.default_work_rate

HUN_WONDER_DISCOUNT = <Attribute.HUN_WONDER_DISCOUNT: 196>

  • Purpose: Additional time required for relic/wonder victories in one tenth of a year

  • Defaults:

    • 0: default
    • 1000: (100 years) for the Hun player, after researching atheism. The value of this resource of each player is added to determine the total extra time for relic/wonder victories, i.e. it adds up if multiple hun players get the tech

  • Note: Internally, relic and wonder victory countdowns are measured in one tenths of an year, the fractional part is just not shown ingame

SPIES_DISCOUNT = <Attribute.SPIES_DISCOUNT: 197>

  • Purpose: Boolean: Halves the cost of spies per villager, and caps it at 15k gold max instead of the usual 30k

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
UNUSED_RESOURCE_198 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_198: 198>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_199 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_199: 199>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_200 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_200: 200>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_201 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_201: 201>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_202 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_202: 202>
  • Purpose: Unused
REVEAL_MAP = <Attribute.REVEAL_MAP: 203>

  • Purpose: Controls the map visibility for a player.

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Normal
    • 1: Explored
    • 2: All Visible
REVEAL_UNIT_ON_MAP = <Attribute.REVEAL_UNIT_ON_MAP: 204>

  • Purpose: Controls the visibility of other players' units for a player

  • Note: Positive IDs will reveal a unit temporarily only when it is created, Negative IDs will reveal a unit permanently

FEITORIA_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FEITORIA_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 205>

  • Purpose: Feitoria food production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of food obtained from owning n number of Feitorias is given by n * feitoria_food_productivity * 1.6

FEITORIA_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FEITORIA_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 206>

  • Purpose: Feitoria wood production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning n number of Feitorias is given by n * feitoria_wood_productivity * 0.7

FEITORIA_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FEITORIA_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY: 207>

  • Purpose: Feitoria stone production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning n number of Feitorias is given by n * feitoria_stone_productivity * 0.3

FEITORIA_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FEITORIA_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 208>

  • Purpose: Feitoria gold production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning n number of Feitorias is given by n * feitoria_gold_productivity * 1

REVEAL_ENEMY_TOWN_CENTERS = <Attribute.REVEAL_ENEMY_TOWN_CENTERS: 209>

  • Purpose: Boolean: reveal enemy town centre location for the source player

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 5: Vietnamese

  • Note: The bonus works for all values >=1, the choice of setting it to 5 for vietnamese seems arbitrary

RELICS_VISIBLE_ON_MAP = <Attribute.RELICS_VISIBLE_ON_MAP: 210>

  • Purpose: Boolean: reveal relics on map amount

  • Defaults:

    • -1: Default
    • 42: Burmese

  • Note: Burmese reveal relics on map bonus. Only works in RMS, manually changing this in the editor does not seem to have any effects

ELEVATION_HIGHER_BONUS = <Attribute.ELEVATION_HIGHER_BONUS: 211>

  • Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from higher elevation

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 0.25: Tatars

  • Note: Damage that units on higher elevation deal to units on lower elevation is multiplied by 1.25 + elevation_bonus_higher

ELEVATION_LOWER_BONUS = <Attribute.ELEVATION_LOWER_BONUS: 212>

  • Purpose: The fraction for additional bonus damage dealt from lower elevation

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default

  • Note: Damage that units on lower elevation deal to units on higher elevation is multiplied by 0.75 + elevation_bonus_lower

RAIDING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.RAIDING_PRODUCTIVITY: 213>

  • Purpose: Keshik gold generation rate per 100 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 50: (0.5 g/s) Tatars

  • Note: Note that in practice, due to attack reload time and frame delay, Keshiks don't actually produce 0.5 g/s, but a slightly lower value

MERCENARY_KIPCHAK_COUNT = <Attribute.MERCENARY_KIPCHAK_COUNT: 214>

  • Purpose: Total number of mercenary kipchak creatable

  • Note: Researching Cuman Mercenaries sets this to 10. Making mercenary Kipchaks costs one unit of this resource

UNUSED_RESOURCE_215 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_215: 215>
  • Purpose: Unused
SHEPHERD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.SHEPHERD_PRODUCTIVITY: 216>

  • Purpose: Amount of food collected from sheep multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 1.57: Tatars

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a villager, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate. In the case of Tatars, This is compensated for by reducing villager work rate by 57%

SHARED_LINE_OF_SIGHT = <Attribute.SHARED_LINE_OF_SIGHT: 217>
  • Purpose: Unused
EARLY_TOWN_CENTER_LIMIT = <Attribute.EARLY_TOWN_CENTER_LIMIT: 218>

  • Purpose: This is the number of extra TCs a player is allowed to build IF TCs are enabled in feudal age

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default
    • 2: Cumans

  • Note: Since generic civs don't get access to TCs in feudal, the 10k amount doesn't matter, but if you're trying to make a map where you want people to be able to make TCs in feudal, make sure to set this value to 10k for cumans!

FISHING_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FISHING_PRODUCTIVITY: 219>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for food gathered by fishing ships

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: Since this works by multiplying the amount of resources gathered by a fishing ship, it has a side effect of increasing the gather rate

UNUSED_RESOURCE_220 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_220: 220>
  • Purpose: Unused
MONUMENT_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.MONUMENT_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 221>

  • Purpose: Monument food trickle rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: In KoTH games

  • Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is 0.7925 * food_trickle_from_monument

MONUMENT_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.MONUMENT_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 222>

  • Purpose: Monument wood trickle rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: In KoTH games

  • Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is 0.7925 * wood_trickle_from_monument

MONUMENT_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.MONUMENT_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY: 223>

  • Purpose: Monument stone trickle rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: In KoTH games

  • Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is 0.7925 * stone_trickle_from_monument

MONUMENT_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.MONUMENT_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 224>

  • Purpose: Monument gold trickle rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: In KoTH games

  • Note: The amount of resources obtained by owning a monument is 0.7925 * gold_trickle_from_monument

RELIC_FOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = <Attribute.RELIC_FOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE: 225>

  • Purpose: Relic food production per minute

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 30: Burgundians
    • 15: Burgundians after getting hit with Atheism
VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_GAIA = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_GAIA: 226>
  • Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to gaia
VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_ANIMALS = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_ANIMALS: 227>
  • Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to wild animals
VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_AI_PLAYER = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_AI_PLAYER: 228>
  • Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to AIs
VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_HUMAN_PLAYER = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_KILLED_BY_HUMAN_PLAYER: 229>
  • Purpose: Total number of villagers lost to human players
FOOD_GENERATION_RATE = <Attribute.FOOD_GENERATION_RATE: 230>
  • Purpose: Free food trickle rate (per minute)
WOOD_GENERATION_RATE = <Attribute.WOOD_GENERATION_RATE: 231>
  • Purpose: Free wood trickle rate (per minute)
STONE_GENERATION_RATE = <Attribute.STONE_GENERATION_RATE: 232>
  • Purpose: Free stone trickle rate (per minute)
GOLD_GENERATION_RATE = <Attribute.GOLD_GENERATION_RATE: 233>
  • Purpose: Free gold trickle rate (per minute)
SPAWN_LIMIT = <Attribute.SPAWN_LIMIT: 234>

  • Purpose: The limit to the number of spawning buildings that can spawn units from spawn command in a technology

  • Note: This is usually overridden by techs

FLEMISH_MILITIA_POPULATION = <Attribute.FLEMISH_MILITIA_POPULATION: 235>
  • Purpose: Number of alive flemish militia
FARMING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FARMING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 236>

  • Purpose: Farming gold generation rate per 100 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 2: (0.02 g/s per farmer) after Burgundian Vineyards

  • Note: Only generates gold while collecting food from farms, and not when walking on them down

FOLWARK_COLLECTION_AMOUNT = <Attribute.FOLWARK_COLLECTION_AMOUNT: 237>

  • Purpose: This is the amount of food collected from farms built around a folwark

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 17.5: Poles
    • 19.25: Poles with Chinese Ally
    • 25: Poles with Horse Collar
    • 27.5: Poles with Horse Collar & Chinese Ally
    • 37.5: Poles with Heavy Plow
    • 41.25: Poles with Heavy Plow & Chinese Ally
    • 55: Poles with Crop Rotation
    • 60.5: Poles with Crop Rotation & Chinese Ally
FOLWARK_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = <Attribute.FOLWARK_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE: 238>

  • Purpose: This is the ID of the resource that is given when a farm is constructed around a folwark

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Poles
    • -1: Default
FOLWARK_BUILDING_TYPE = <Attribute.FOLWARK_BUILDING_TYPE: 239>

  • Purpose: This is the ID of the building that the Folwark needs to upgrade from for the farm collection ability to work

  • Defaults:

    • 68: (Mill) Poles
    • -1: Default
UNITS_CONVERTED = <Attribute.UNITS_CONVERTED: 240>
  • Purpose: The amount of units lost to enemy conversions
STONE_MINING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.STONE_MINING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 241>

  • Purpose: Stone mining gold generation rate per 100 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 18: Poles
    • 20.7: Poles with Stone Mining
    • 23.805: Poles with Stone Shaft Mining
TRADE_WORKSHOP_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.TRADE_WORKSHOP_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 242>

  • Purpose: Trade Workshop food production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of food obtained from owning n number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by n * tws_food_productivity * 2.25

TRADE_WORKSHOP_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.TRADE_WORKSHOP_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 243>

  • Purpose: Trade Workshop wood production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of wood obtained from owning n number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by n * tws_wood_productivity * 2.25

TRADE_WORKSHOP_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.TRADE_WORKSHOP_STONE_PRODUCTIVITY: 244>

  • Purpose: Trade Workshop stone production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default

  • Note: The amount of stone obtained from owning n number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by n * tws_stone_productivity * 2.25

TRADE_WORKSHOP_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.TRADE_WORKSHOP_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 245>

  • Purpose: Trade Workshop gold production rate multiplier

  • Defaults:

    • 1: Default

  • Note: The amount of gold obtained from owning n number of TWS (Unit 1647) is given by n * tws_gold_productivity * 2.25

UNITS_VALUE_TOTAL = <Attribute.UNITS_VALUE_TOTAL: 246>

  • Purpose: Total cost of all units created so far

  • Note: This does not decrease when the units die

BUILDINGS_VALUE_TOTAL = <Attribute.BUILDINGS_VALUE_TOTAL: 247>

  • Purpose: Total cost of all buildings created so far

  • Note: Increases when foundations are placed. This does not decrease if the foundation is deleted

VILLAGERS_CREATED_TOTAL = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_CREATED_TOTAL: 248>
  • Purpose: Total number of villagers created so far
VILLAGERS_IDLE_PERIODS_TOTAL = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_IDLE_PERIODS_TOTAL: 249>

  • Purpose: Amount of villagers that entered an idle state since game start

  • Note:

  1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
  2. The number of villagers that entered an idle state since the last updated is added to this resource.
  3. Starting villager count is the initial value
VILLAGERS_IDLE_SECONDS_TOTAL = <Attribute.VILLAGERS_IDLE_SECONDS_TOTAL: 250>

  • Purpose: Amount of total seconds all villagers have been idle since game start

  • Note:

  1. This only updates every 5 physical minutes.
  2. The idle time in seconds for all villagers since the last time this resource was updated is added to this resource.
  3. A villager immediately adds its own idle time to this resource if it dies
TRADE_FOOD_PERCENT = <Attribute.TRADE_FOOD_PERCENT: 251>

  • Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as food

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 10: Bengalis
TRADE_WOOD_PERCENT = <Attribute.TRADE_WOOD_PERCENT: 252>

  • Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as wood

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
TRADE_STONE_PERCENT = <Attribute.TRADE_STONE_PERCENT: 253>

  • Purpose: Percentage of gold generated from trade that is also given as stone

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
LIVESTOCK_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.LIVESTOCK_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 254>

  • Purpose: Garrisoned herdable food generation rate per 60 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 3.5: (0.0583 f/s per herdable) Gurjaras
UNUSED_RESOURCE_255 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_255: 255>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_256 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_256: 256>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_257 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_257: 257>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_258 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_258: 258>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_259 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_259: 259>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_260 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_260: 260>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_261 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_261: 261>
  • Purpose: Unused
CIVILIZATION_NAME_OVERRIDE = <Attribute.CIVILIZATION_NAME_OVERRIDE: 262>
  • Purpose:
STARTING_SCOUT_ID = <Attribute.STARTING_SCOUT_ID: 263>

  • Purpose: Unit ID for the starting scout. Can be set to any unit (even buildings)

  • Defaults:

    • 448: (Scout Cavalry) Default
    • 751: (Eagle Scout) Aztecs, Incas and Mayans
    • 1755: (Camel Scout) Gurjaras
RELIC_WOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE = <Attribute.RELIC_WOOD_PRODUCTION_RATE: 264>

  • Purpose: Relic wood production per minute

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default

  • Note: This is not affected by Atheism

RELIC_STONE_PRODUCTION_RATE = <Attribute.RELIC_STONE_PRODUCTION_RATE: 265>

  • Purpose: Relic stone production per minute

  • Note: This is not affected by Atheism

CHOPPING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.CHOPPING_GOLD_PRODUCTIVITY: 266>

  • Purpose: Lumberjack chopping gold generation rate per 100 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 1.5: (0.015 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money
    • 1.8: (0.018 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe
    • 2.16: (0.0216 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw
    • 2.376: (0.02376 g/s per lumberjack) Vietnamese with paper money & Double Bit Axe & Bow Saw & Two-Man Saw

  • Note: Only generates gold while collecting wood from trees, and not when cutting them down

FORAGING_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.FORAGING_WOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 267>

  • Purpose: Forager foraging wood generation rate per 100 seconds

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Default
    • 10.4753: (0.104753 w/s per forager) Portuguese
HUNTER_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.HUNTER_PRODUCTIVITY: 268>
  • Purpose: Hunter hunting gold production rate per 100 seconds
TECHNOLOGY_REWARD_EFFECT = <Attribute.TECHNOLOGY_REWARD_EFFECT: 269>
  • Purpose: This is the ID of an additional effect which will fire when any technology is researched
UNIT_REPAIR_COST = <Attribute.UNIT_REPAIR_COST: 270>
  • Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair siege units and ships
BUILDING_REPAIR_COST = <Attribute.BUILDING_REPAIR_COST: 271>
  • Purpose: Percentage of cost required to repair buildings
ELEVATION_HIGHER_DAMAGE = <Attribute.ELEVATION_HIGHER_DAMAGE: 272>

  • Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from higher elevation

  • Note: This is applied after the calculations from Elevation Higher Bonus and Elevation Lower Bonus

ELEVATION_LOWER_DAMAGE = <Attribute.ELEVATION_LOWER_DAMAGE: 273>

  • Purpose: Damage modifier for own units when attacked from lower elevation

  • Note: This is applied after the calculations from Elevation Higher Bonus and Elevation Lower Bonus

INFANTRY_KILL_REWARD = <Attribute.INFANTRY_KILL_REWARD: 274>

  • Purpose: This resource currently effectively enables/disables gold generation per second by infantry killing villagers, trade units and monks

  • Defaults:

    • 0: All Civs
    • 1: Vikings after Chieftains

  • Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on infantry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is set to the different rates for different types of targets for infantry

UNUSED_RESOURCE_275 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_275: 275>
  • Purpose: Unused
UNUSED_RESOURCE_276 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_276: 276>
  • Purpose: Unused
RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS_DAMAGE = <Attribute.RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS_DAMAGE: 277>

  • Purpose: Multiplier for the amount of fire damage done by demolition ships

  • Defaults:

    • 0: Before red cliffs tactics is researched
    • 1: After red cliffs tactics is researched

  • Note: This implies that converted units that are affected by the tech won't do fire damage after being converted

UNUSED_RESOURCE_278 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_278: 278>
  • Purpose: Unused
MILITARY_CAN_CONVERT = <Attribute.MILITARY_CAN_CONVERT: 279>
  • Purpose: Military units with the conversion task can convert units if this is set to > 0 for a player
MILITARY_CONVERT_RANGE = <Attribute.MILITARY_CONVERT_RANGE: 280>
  • Purpose: Adds to the conversion range of military units
MILITARY_CONVERT_CHANCE = <Attribute.MILITARY_CONVERT_CHANCE: 281>
  • Purpose: Determines the conversion probability per monk second
MILITARY_CONVERT_RECHARGE = <Attribute.MILITARY_CONVERT_RECHARGE: 282>
  • Purpose: Determines the faith recharge rate after successful conversions
SPAWN_INSIDE = <Attribute.SPAWN_INSIDE: 283>

  • Purpose: Determines whenever spawned unit via xsEffectAmount(cSpawnUnit,...) or certain techs is spawned garrisoned or outside

  • Defaults:

    • 0: All Civs
    • 1: Set briefly for the Armenians after their first Fortified Church is built to spawn the relic garrisoned.

  • Note: This is usually overridden by techs

CAVALRY_KILL_REWARD = <Attribute.CAVALRY_KILL_REWARD: 284>

  • Purpose: This resource effectively sets the gold generation rate per second by cavalry fighting other military units

  • Defaults:

    • 0: All Civs

  • Note: Technically, this resource is used as a multiplier for the resource generated by task 154 currently on cavalry units. Task 154 can change which resource does this, and it is also what really controls which resource is generated (Resource Out) and the rate of generation (Work Value 1) which is just set to 1 for cavalry.

SHARED_VISIBILITY = <Attribute.SHARED_VISIBILITY: 285>

  • Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control LoS with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.

  • Note: This does not change LoS for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled

SHARED_EXPLORATION = <Attribute.SHARED_EXPLORATION: 286>

  • Purpose: Lower bits 1 to 9 control map exploration with players 0 to 8 with 0 being gaia.

  • Note: This does not change exploration for allies if the shared exploration setting in the lobby is enabled

MILITARY_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.MILITARY_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 287>
  • Purpose: The amount of food generated by soldiers per 100 seconds
PASTURE_FOOD_AMOUNT = <Attribute.PASTURE_FOOD_AMOUNT: 288>
  • Purpose: Determines the amount of food pastures provide
PASTURE_ANIMAL_COUNT = <Attribute.PASTURE_ANIMAL_COUNT: 289>
  • Purpose: Determines the amount of animals on a pasture.
PASTURE_HERDER_COUNT = <Attribute.PASTURE_HERDER_COUNT: 290>
  • Purpose: Determines the maximum amount of villagers that can work at once on a pasture
CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY_UNUSED = <Attribute.CHOPPING_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY_UNUSED: 291>
  • Purpose: Unused - duplicate name, actually controlled by resource 502
ANIMAL_DECAY_PREVENTION = <Attribute.ANIMAL_DECAY_PREVENTION: 292>
  • Purpose: Prevents animal corpses from losing food when being gathered by a villager
HERDER_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.HERDER_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 293>
  • Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
SHEPHERD_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY = <Attribute.SHEPHERD_FOOD_PRODUCTIVITY: 294>
  • Purpose: Percent extra food generated by herders and shepherds
UNUSED_RESOURCE_295 = <Attribute.UNUSED_RESOURCE_295: 295>
  • Purpose: Unused

  • Purpose: Unused

  • Purpose: Number of gaia units killed

  • Note: This refers to lobby/slot/world player 6, not editor/scenario player 6
